able.example_en: My older sister is able to solve difficult math problems quickly.
able.example_zh: 我姐姐能夠快速解決困難的數學問題。

about.example_en: We talked about our plans for the summer vacation yesterday.
about.example_zh: 我們昨天談論了暑假的計畫。

above.definition: 在（或向）…上面；在（或向）…較高處
above.example_en: The clouds float above the mountains on clear, sunny days.
above.example_zh: 晴天時，雲浮在山的上方。

abroad.example_en: My uncle travels abroad every year for his business work.
abroad.example_zh: 我叔叔每年因為工作出國旅行。

absent.definition: （尤指上課或工作）缺勤的；缺席的；不在場的
absent.example_en: Tom was absent from school yesterday because he had a fever.
absent.example_zh: 湯姆昨天缺勤，因為他發燒了。

accept.example_en: She accepted the job offer and will start working next month.
accept.example_zh: 她接受了工作機會，下個月開始工作。

accident.example_en: There was a serious accident on the highway during rush hour today.
accident.example_zh: 今天高峰時段高速公路上發生了一場嚴重事故。

across.definition: 從一邊到另一邊;穿過;橫過
across.example_en: We walked across the busy street carefully using the zebra crossing.
across.example_zh: 我們小心地通過斑馬線穿過繁忙的街道。

act.example_en: His kind act of helping the old woman impressed everyone nearby.
act.example_zh: 他幫助老婦人的善舉給在場的人都留下了深刻印象。

action.definition: （尤指應對問題或困難的）行動；行動過程；行為
action.example_en: The teacher took action when she noticed bullying in the classroom.
action.example_zh: 老師注意到教室裡有霸凌情況時立即採取了行動。

active.example_en: She is very active in school clubs and sports programs.
active.example_zh: 她在學校社團和運動項目中非常活躍。

activity.example_en: There was lots of activity at the market on Saturday morning.
activity.example_zh: 星期六早上市場裡很熱鬧，人來人往。

actor.example_en: The famous actor gave an excellent performance in the new movie.
actor.example_zh: 這位著名演員在新電影中表現出色。

actress.example_en: The young actress won an award for her impressive acting skills.
actress.example_zh: 這位年輕女演員因為卓越的表演技巧贏得了獎項。

actually.example_en: The movie looked boring, but it was actually very entertaining.
actually.example_zh: 這部電影看起來很無聊，但實際上非常有趣。

add.example_en: Please add two cups of flour to the mixing bowl carefully.
add.example_zh: 請小心地將兩杯麵粉加入混合碗中。

address.example_en: I wrote my address clearly on the envelope before mailing it.
address.example_zh: 我在信封上清楚地寫下了我的地址才寄出。

admire.example_en: Many students admire their teacher for her patience and kindness.
admire.example_zh: 許多學生欣賞他們老師的耐心和善良。

adult.example_en: The swimming pool has separate areas for children and adults.
adult.example_zh: 游泳池有兒童區和成人區的分隔。

advertisement.example_en: The television advertisement for the new phone was very creative.
advertisement.example_zh: 新手機的電視廣告非常有創意。

advice.example_en: My teacher gave me helpful advice about choosing which subjects to study.
advice.example_zh: 我的老師給了我選科的有用建議。

advise.definition: 勸告;忠告;向…提供意見，給…出主意
advise.example_en: My parents advise me to study hard and exercise regularly every day.
advise.example_zh: 我的父母勸我每天要認真讀書和經常運動。

affect.example_en: Heavy rain might affect tomorrow's soccer game at the school field.
affect.example_zh: 大雨可能會影響明天在校場的足球比賽。

afraid.definition: 畏懼的，害怕的;擔憂的，發愁的
afraid.example_en: She felt afraid when she walked through the dark street alone last night.
afraid.example_zh: 她昨晚獨自走過黑暗的街道時感到害怕。

after.definition: （時間、地點或順序）在…之後;（一個）接著（一個）
after.example_en: After finishing homework, the children played games in the park together.
after.example_zh: 做完功課後，孩子們一起在公園玩遊戲。

afternoon.example_en: Every afternoon, students go to the library to read books and study.
afternoon.example_zh: 每個下午，學生都會到圖書館讀書和複習。

again.example_en: He made the same mistake again, so his teacher made him correct it.
again.example_zh: 他又犯了同樣的錯誤，所以他的老師叫他改正。

against.example_en: The new rules seem against what students want, but teachers think they are fair.
against.example_zh: 新規則似乎與學生的想法相反，但老師認為很公平。

age.example_en: At the age of thirteen, most students start learning more difficult subjects in school.
age.example_zh: 在十三歲的年紀，大多數學生開始在學校學習更難的科目。

ago.example_en: Two years ago, I could not speak English well, but now I can communicate.
ago.example_zh: 兩年前我英文說得不好，但現在我能進行溝通了。

agree.example_en: Most students agree that school should have more activities for them to enjoy.
agree.example_zh: 大多數學生贊成學校應該有更多讓他們享受的活動。

ahead.example_en: The runner ahead of us is running very fast toward the finish line.
ahead.example_zh: 在我們前面的跑步者正在快速地朝終點線奔跑。

aim.example_en: Her main aim is to get good grades and enter a good high school.
aim.example_zh: 她的主要目標是取得好成績並進入一所好的高中。

air.example_en: On a clear day, the air is fresh and we can see the mountains far away.
air.example_zh: 在晴朗的日子，空氣很清新，我們可以看到遠處的山。

airplane.example_en: An airplane flew over the city while we were playing outside in the afternoon.
airplane.example_zh: 當我們下午在外面玩時，一架飛機飛過了這座城市。

airport.example_en: We went to the airport early to wait for my grandmother coming from Taipei.
airport.example_zh: 我們早早來到機場等待從台北來的祖母。

alarm.example_en: When the fire alarm went off, all students left the classroom very quickly.
alarm.example_zh: 當火警警報響起時，所有學生都很快地離開教室。

album.example_en: My brother bought a new album by his favorite singer last weekend.
album.example_zh: 我哥哥上週末買了他最喜歡的歌手的新專輯。

alike.example_en: The twin sisters look very much alike, so it is hard to tell them apart.
alike.example_zh: 這對孿生姐妹看起來很相像，所以很難分辨她們。

alive.example_en: The plants in my bedroom must get enough sunlight to stay alive and healthy.
alive.example_zh: 我房間裡的植物必須得到足夠的陽光才能活著並保持健康。

all.example_en: All the students in our class need to finish their homework today.
all.example_zh: 我們班所有的學生都要在今天完成功課。

allow.definition: 使有可能;允許，准許;容許
allow.example_en: The teacher doesn't allow us to use phones during class time.
allow.example_zh: 老師不允許我們在上課時使用手機。

almost.definition: 幾乎，差不多，差一點，將近
almost.example_en: We were almost late to school because the traffic was heavy.
almost.example_zh: 因為交通擁擠，我們差點遲到學校。

alone.definition: 單獨（的），獨自（的）;孤獨的（地），無伴的（地）
alone.example_en: She prefers to study alone in a quiet room at home.
alone.example_zh: 她喜歡在家的安靜房間裡獨自讀書。

along.example_en: We walked along the beach and enjoyed the beautiful sunset.
along.example_zh: 我們沿著海灘散步，欣賞美麗的日落。

aloud.example_en: The student read the poem aloud to the whole class yesterday.
aloud.example_zh: 那個學生昨天向全班大聲朗讀了詩歌。

already.example_en: It was only noon, but I had already eaten two meals.
already.example_zh: 才到中午，我已經吃過兩頓飯了。

also.example_en: She plays volleyball and also enjoys swimming in her free time.
also.example_zh: 她打排球，而且在空閒時間也喜歡游泳。

altogether.example_en: We collected altogether thirty books for the school library donation.
altogether.example_zh: 我們一共為學校圖書館募捐了三十本書。

always.example_en: My grandmother always makes delicious soup when we visit her home.
always.example_zh: 我們去奶奶家時，她總是做美味的湯。

ambulance.example_en: The ambulance rushed to the hospital with the injured person inside.
ambulance.example_zh: 救護車載著傷患急速趕往醫院。

among.example_en: Among all the fruits, apples are what I like the most.
among.example_zh: 在所有水果中，我最喜歡蘋果。

ancient.definition: 古代的；古老的；年代久遠的
ancient.example_en: The museum displayed ancient artifacts from a thousand years ago.
ancient.example_zh: 博物館展出了一千年前的古代文物。

angel.example_en: In the children's story, a kind angel helped the lost boy.
angel.example_zh: 在這個兒童故事中，一位善良的天使幫助了迷路的男孩。

anger.example_en: His anger disappeared quickly after his friend apologized sincerely.
anger.example_zh: 在朋友真誠道歉後，他的憤怒很快消散了。

angry.example_en: The teacher looked very angry when she discovered the broken window.
angry.example_zh: 當老師發現破窗戶時，看起來非常生氣。

animal.definition: （除人、鳥、魚和昆蟲之外的）動物；獸；牲畜
animal.example_en: The zoo has many interesting animals that children enjoy watching.
animal.example_zh: 動物園裡有很多有趣的動物，孩子們喜歡觀看。

ankle.example_en: She twisted her ankle while playing basketball at school.
ankle.example_zh: 她在學校打籃球時扭傷了踝部。

another.example_en: I finished this book, so I want to read another one soon.
another.example_zh: 我讀完了這本書，所以我想很快再讀另一本。

answer.definition: 回答;作答;答應;答覆;答案
answer.example_en: The student raised her hand and gave the correct answer immediately.
answer.example_zh: 那個學生舉手，立刻給出了正確答案。

ant.example_en: We watched hundreds of ants carrying food back to their nest.
ant.example_zh: 我們看著數百隻螞蟻把食物搬回它們的巢。

any.example_en: Do you have any experience with playing musical instruments?
any.example_zh: 你有任何彈奏樂器的經驗嗎？

anyone.definition: （用於疑問句和否定句中）有人，任何人
anyone.example_en: Did anyone see where I left my keys yesterday?
anyone.example_zh: 昨天有人看到我把鑰匙放在哪裡嗎？

anything.definition: （用於疑問句或否定句中）任何事物，任何東西
anything.example_en: Is there anything you'd like to eat for dinner tonight?

anywhere.definition: 在（或去）任何地方;隨便哪個地方
anywhere.example_en: You can sit anywhere you want in the classroom today.
anywhere.example_zh: 今天你可以坐在教室裡的任何地方。

apartment.example_en: My cousin just moved into a small apartment near the university.
apartment.example_zh: 我表哥剛搬進靠近大學的一間小公寓。

apologize.example_en: Tom had to apologize to his sister for breaking her favorite toy.
apologize.example_zh: 湯姆必須為打破妹妹最喜歡的玩具而向她道歉。

appear.example_en: Dark clouds began to appear in the sky this afternoon.
appear.example_zh: 今天下午天空開始出現烏雲。

apple.example_en: My grandmother grows apples in her garden every autumn.
apple.example_zh: 我奶奶每年秋天在她的花園裡種蘋果。

appreciate.example_en: The teacher really appreciated her student's effort and hard work.
appreciate.example_zh: 老師很欣賞她學生的努力和辛勤工作。

april.example_en: Our school trip to the mountains is planned for April.
april.example_zh: 我們學校去山上的旅行定在四月。

area.example_en: This area of the city has many new restaurants and shops.
area.example_zh: 城市的這個地區有許多新的餐廳和商店。

argue.example_en: My brothers often argue about which sport is the best to play.
argue.example_zh: 我的兄弟們經常爭論哪項運動最好玩。

arm.example_en: She raised her arm high to ask the teacher a question.
arm.example_zh: 她舉起手臂高高地向老師提問。

armchair.example_en: My grandfather likes to sit in his armchair and read the newspaper.
armchair.example_zh: 我爺爺喜歡坐在他的扶手椅上看報紙。

army.example_en: My uncle joined the army after he finished high school.
army.example_zh: 我叔叔高中畢業後加入了軍隊。

around.definition: 四處，周圍；圍繞，（環）繞；掉轉
around.example_en: The teacher walked around the classroom and checked everyone's homework.
around.example_zh: 老師在教室裡走來走去檢查每個人的功課。

arrange.example_en: We need to arrange a time to meet and discuss the project.
arrange.example_zh: 我們需要安排一個時間見面討論這個項目。

arrive.definition: 到達，抵達（尤指到達旅途的終點）;到來;來臨
arrive.example_en: The train should arrive at the station at exactly three o'clock.
arrive.example_zh: 列車應該在三點整到達車站。

art.definition: （包括雕塑、繪畫、音樂等的） 藝術
art.example_en: In art class, students learned how to paint with watercolors.
art.example_zh: 在美術課上，學生們學會了如何用水彩畫畫。

artist.definition: 藝術家;美術家;畫家;雕塑家
artist.example_en: The artist spent three hours painting a beautiful landscape in watercolor.
artist.example_zh: 那位藝術家花了三小時用水彩畫了一幅美麗的風景畫。

as.example_en: She plays volleyball as well as her older sister does.
as.example_zh: 她打排球的水平和她的姐姐一樣好。

ask.example_en: Can I ask you a question about tomorrow's math homework?
ask.example_zh: 我可以問你一個關於明天數學功課的問題嗎？

asleep.example_en: The cat fell asleep on the warm sunny windowsill this afternoon.
asleep.example_zh: 這隻貓今天下午在溫暖的陽光窗臺上睡著了。

assistant.example_en: The teacher's assistant helped organize all the science lab materials.
assistant.example_zh: 老師的助手幫忙整理了所有科學實驗室的材料。

assume.definition: 假定，假設;臆斷，想當然地認為
assume.example_en: Don't assume everyone likes spicy food because you do.
assume.example_zh: 不要假設每個人都喜歡辣食物，只因為你喜歡。

attack.example_en: During the basketball game, the team's quick attack caught their opponents off guard.
attack.example_zh: 籃球比賽中，球隊的快速進攻讓對手措手不及。

attention.example_en: The advertisement caught everyone's attention because it was very colorful and funny.
attention.example_zh: 這則廣告很吸引人注意，因為非常五彩繽紛和有趣。

august.example_en: We're planning to visit my grandparents in August next year.
august.example_zh: 我們計畫明年八月去拜訪我的祖父母。

aunt.definition: 姑母;姨母;嬸嬸;伯母;舅母
aunt.example_en: My aunt always brings homemade cookies when she visits us on weekends.
aunt.example_zh: 我的姑姑每次週末來訪時都會帶自製的餅乾。

autumn.example_en: The leaves turn beautiful colors during autumn before they fall down.
autumn.example_zh: 秋天時樹葉在飄落前會變成美麗的顏色。

available.example_en: Is your brother available to help us move the furniture tomorrow?
available.example_zh: 你哥哥明天有空幫我們搬家具嗎？

avoid.example_en: I try to avoid eating too much candy before bedtime.
avoid.example_zh: 我儘量避免在睡前吃太多糖果。

away.definition: 去（或在）別處；向另一方向；向一邊
away.example_en: My family drove away from the city early to beat traffic.
away.example_zh: 我家人早早開車離開城市以躲避交通。

baby.definition: （尤指尚未學會走路或說話的）嬰兒，嬰孩
baby.example_en: The baby cried when the dentist started cleaning her tiny teeth.
baby.example_zh: 當牙醫開始清潔嬰兒的小牙齒時，她哭了。

back.definition: 在原處；回到原處；恢復原狀；返回；回到以前
back.example_en: The quarterback stood at the back of the field during the practice session.
back.example_zh: 四分衛在練習期間站在場地的後面。

bad.definition: 壞的，不好的；令人不悅的
bad.example_en: He felt bad about forgetting his friend's birthday last week.
bad.example_zh: 他為上週忘記朋友的生日感到難受。

badminton.example_en: We play badminton in the gym every Tuesday after school.
badminton.example_zh: 我們每週二放學後在體育館裡打羽毛球。

bag.example_en: She packed her books and lunch in a large blue bag.
bag.example_zh: 她把書和午餐裝進一個大藍色的袋子裡。

bake.example_en: My mother bakes fresh bread every Saturday morning for our family.
bake.example_zh: 我媽媽每個星期六早上為全家烤新鮮麵包。

bakery.example_en: She buys fresh bread from the bakery near her home every morning.
bakery.example_zh: 她每天早上都從家附近的麵包店買新鮮的麵包。

balcony.example_en: The apartment has a small balcony where plants are growing nicely.
balcony.example_zh: 這間公寓有一個小陽臺，植物在那裡長得很茂盛。

ball.example_en: The children played with a red ball in the park for hours.
ball.example_zh: 孩子們在公園裡玩一個紅球玩了好幾個小時。

balloon.example_en: Colorful balloons decorated the ceiling of the birthday party room.
balloon.example_zh: 五彩繽紛的氣球裝飾著生日派對房間的天花板。

banana.example_en: He ate a banana and an apple for his healthy breakfast.
banana.example_zh: 他吃了香蕉和蘋果作為健康的早餐。

band.example_en: The school band performed loudly at the music festival last week.
band.example_zh: 校樂隊上週在音樂節上表演得非常響亮。

bank.example_en: My mother went to the bank to withdraw money for the trip.
bank.example_zh: 我媽媽去銀行取錢準備旅行。

barbecue.example_en: Last Sunday we barbecued chicken and vegetables on our terrace.
barbecue.example_zh: 上週日我們在陽臺上烤雞肉和蔬菜。

barber.example_en: The barber cut his hair short so it would be more comfortable in summer.
barber.example_zh: 理髮師把他的頭髮剪得很短，這樣夏天會更舒服。

bark.example_en: The dog barked loudly when it heard a noise outside the house.
bark.example_zh: 狗聽到房子外的聲音時大聲吠叫。

base.example_en: The lamp has a heavy base so it won't fall over easily.
base.example_zh: 台燈有一個沉重的底座，所以它不容易摔倒。

baseball.example_en: My brother plays baseball every Saturday with his school team.
baseball.example_zh: 我哥哥每個星期六都和他的學校隊伍打棒球。

basement.example_en: They found old boxes and toys stored in the dark basement.
basement.example_zh: 他們在黑暗的地下室裡找到了舊盒子和玩具。

basic.example_en: Learning basic English words is the first step for all students.
basic.example_zh: 學習基礎英文單字是所有學生的第一步。

basket.example_en: She carried a basket full of fresh vegetables from the market.
basket.example_zh: 她從市場提著一個裝滿新鮮蔬菜的籃子。

basketball.example_en: The basketball game between two schools was exciting and full of action.
basketball.example_zh: 兩所學校之間的籃球比賽令人興奮，充滿了精彩時刻。

bat.example_en: He swung the baseball bat hard and hit the ball far into the field.
bat.example_zh: 他用力揮動棒球棒，把球打得很遠進入了球場。

bath.example_en: After a long day of sports, a warm bath feels absolutely wonderful.
bath.example_zh: 經過一整天的運動後，溫暖的洗澡感覺棒極了。

bathe.example_en: On hot summer days, children love to bathe in the cool river.
bathe.example_zh: 在炎熱的夏日，孩子們喜歡在涼爽的河裡游泳。

bathroom.example_en: The bathroom needs to be cleaned before our guests arrive tomorrow.
bathroom.example_zh: 浴室需要在明天客人到達前打掃乾淨。

beach.example_en: We spent the afternoon playing volleyball on the sandy beach.
beach.example_zh: 我們在沙灘上整個下午都在打排球。

bean.example_en: My grandmother grows fresh beans in her garden every summer.
bean.example_zh: 我祖母每個夏天都在花園裡種新鮮的豆子。

bear.example_en: She had to bear the pain after her surgery for several weeks.
bear.example_zh: 她手術後要忍受好幾週的疼痛。

beard.example_en: His grandfather has a long white beard that he carefully combs.
beard.example_zh: 他的祖父有著一條長長的白鬍鬚，他常仔細梳理。

beat.example_en: Our basketball team beat the strongest school in the tournament.
beat.example_zh: 我們籃球隊在比賽中擊敗了最強的學校。

beautiful.example_en: The sunset over the ocean was so beautiful that everyone stopped to watch.
beautiful.example_zh: 海上的日落非常美麗，每個人都停下來觀看。

beauty.example_en: The beauty of the mountain landscape took our breath away during the hike.
beauty.example_zh: 登山時，山景的美麗令我們驚嘆。

because.example_en: She studied hard for the exam because she wanted to get a good grade.
because.example_zh: 她為了考試而努力用功，因為她想得到好成績。

become.example_en: After years of practice, he finally became a professional volleyball player.
become.example_zh: 經過多年的練習，他終於成為了一名職業排球運動員。

bed.example_en: I was so tired after the long hike that I fell into bed immediately.
bed.example_zh: 經過漫長的登山後，我累得馬上跳上床睡覺。

bedroom.example_en: She decorated her bedroom with posters of her favorite musicians and bands.
bedroom.example_zh: 她用最喜歡的音樂人和樂隊的海報裝飾她的臥房。

bee.example_en: A bee flew into the classroom and everyone tried to be very quiet.
bee.example_zh: 一隻蜜蜂飛進教室，每個人都試著保持安靜。

beef.example_en: My father makes delicious beef soup every time the weather gets cold.
beef.example_zh: 天氣變冷時，我父親總是做美味的牛肉湯。

beer.example_en: The restaurant served ice-cold beer with every meal during the summer season.
beer.example_zh: 在夏季，這家餐廳每頓飯都供應冰涼的啤酒。

before.example_en: You should brush your teeth before you go to bed every night.

begin.example_en: The teacher began the lesson by asking students about their weekend plans.
begin.example_zh: 老師先問同學們週末計畫來開始上課。

beginner.example_en: As a beginner at tennis, she felt nervous during her first match.
beginner.example_zh: 作為網球初學者，她在第一場比賽中感到緊張。

beginning.example_en: The beginning of the movie was confusing, but everything became clear later.
beginning.example_zh: 電影的開頭令人困惑，但之後一切都變得清楚了。

behave.example_en: The students agreed to behave well during the field trip to the museum.
behave.example_zh: 學生們同意在博物館實地考察中表現良好。

behind.example_en: He was walking behind his friends on the crowded street because he was tired.
behind.example_zh: 他在擁擠的街道上走在朋友們的後面，因為他很累。

believe.example_en: I believe that hard work and practice can help you succeed in life.
believe.example_zh: 我相信努力和練習能幫助你在人生中成功。

bell.example_en: The bell rang loudly when someone pressed it at the door.
bell.example_zh: 有人按門鈴時，它響亮地鳴了。

belong.example_en: These books belong in the library, not in your bedroom at home.
belong.example_zh: 這些書應該在圖書館裡，不是在你家臥室裡。

below.definition: 在較低處；在某平面之下；（位置）低於
below.example_en: The apartment is on the third floor, and the café is below it.
below.example_zh: 公寓在三樓，咖啡館在它下面。

belt.example_en: He wore a leather belt to keep his pants in place at the waist.
belt.example_zh: 他穿著皮腰帶來把褲子繫在腰上。

bench.example_en: We sat on a wooden bench in the park and watched the sunset.
bench.example_zh: 我們坐在公園的木製長凳上，看著日落。

besides.example_en: The school offers English and math classes, besides sports and music activities.
besides.example_zh: 學校提供英文和數學課程，除此之外還有體育和音樂活動。

between.example_en: The playground sits between the school building and the parking area.
between.example_zh: 操場位於學校建築物和停車場之間。

beyond.example_en: The mountains are beautiful, but the valleys beyond them are even more amazing.
beyond.example_zh: 這些山很漂亮，但遠處的山谷更令人驚嘆。

bicycle.example_en: She rides her bicycle to school every morning to stay healthy.
bicycle.example_zh: 她每天早上騎自行車上學來保持健康。

big.example_en: The elephant is bigger than any other animal in the zoo.
big.example_zh: 大象比動物園裡的任何其他動物都大。

bill.example_en: The electricity bill was higher this month because we used more air conditioning.
bill.example_zh: 這個月電費帳單更高，因為我們使用了更多空調。

biology.example_en: In biology class, we learned how plants get energy from the sun.
biology.example_zh: 在生物課上，我們學到植物如何從太陽獲取能量。

bird.example_en: The small bird sang a beautiful song from the top of the tree.
bird.example_zh: 小鳥從樹頂唱著優美的歌曲。

birthday.example_en: My friends brought gifts and chocolate cake to celebrate my birthday at school.
birthday.example_zh: 我的朋友們帶著禮物和巧克力蛋糕來學校慶祝我的生日。

bite.example_en: The dog likes to bite its toy when playing.
bite.example_zh: 狗喜歡在玩耍時咬它的玩具。

bitter.definition: 極為不滿的；怨恨的；無法釋懷的
bitter.example_en: He felt bitter about losing the game because he had trained so hard.
bitter.example_zh: 他對失敗感到怨恨，因為他訓練得很努力。

black.example_en: She wore a black jacket over her white shirt to the concert.
black.example_zh: 她穿著黑色夾克搭配白色襯衫去看音樂會。

blackboard.example_en: The teacher wrote the homework on the blackboard before the class ended.
blackboard.example_zh: 老師在下課前在黑板上寫下了作業。

blame.example_en: She blamed her sister for breaking her phone.
blame.example_zh: 她責怪她的妹妹打破了她的手機。

blank.example_en: The blank paper was waiting for me to fill it with my ideas.
blank.example_zh: 空白的紙張等著我用想法來填滿它。

blanket.example_en: She wrapped the blanket around her shoulders on that cold winter night.
blanket.example_zh: 在那個寒冷的冬夜，她把毛毯裹在肩上。

blind.example_en: The blind dog could still find its way around the familiar house.
blind.example_zh: 那隻失明的狗仍然能在熟悉的房子裡找到路。

block.example_en: My grandmother lives just one block away from my school.
block.example_zh: 我的祖母住在距離我學校只有一個街區的地方。

blood.example_en: When I hurt my knee, blood dripped down onto my sock.
blood.example_zh: 當我傷到膝蓋時，血滴在了我的襪子上。

bloody.example_en: That bloody alarm went off at five in the morning again.
bloody.example_zh: 那個該死的鬧鐘又在早上五點響起來了。

blow.example_en: Strong wind started to blow through the streets during the storm.
blow.example_zh: 暴風雨中強風開始吹過街道。

blue.definition: 藍色的;天藍色的;青藍色的
blue.example_en: The blue sky in summer makes me want to stay outside longer.
blue.example_zh: 夏天的藍天讓我想待在外面更久。

boat.example_en: They rowed the small boat across the quiet lake this morning.
boat.example_zh: 他們今天早上划著小船穿過平靜的湖。

body.example_en: My body felt tired after running for thirty minutes in the heat.
body.example_zh: 在酷熱中跑了三十分鐘後，我的身體感到疲憊。

boil.example_en: You need to boil the water before you can make tea.
boil.example_zh: 在沏茶之前，你需要把水燒開。

bomb.example_en: The action movie featured many scenes with bombs and explosions.
bomb.example_zh: 這部動作片中有許多炸彈和爆炸場景。

bone.example_en: The doctor said that the fracture in my bone would heal within weeks.
bone.example_zh: 醫生說我骨頭上的裂縫會在幾週內癒合。

book.example_en: I finished reading that mystery book in just two days.
book.example_zh: 我只用了兩天就讀完了那本推理小說。

bookcase.example_en: Her bedroom bookcase was filled with fantasy novels and comic books.
bookcase.example_zh: 她臥室的書架上擺滿了奇幻小說和漫畫書。

bored.definition: 感到無聊的;感到厭煩的
bored.example_en: The bored students stared at the clock waiting for the lesson to end.
bored.example_zh: 無聊的學生盯著時鐘，等待課程結束。

born.example_en: She was born in a small village but moved to the city as a child.
born.example_zh: 她出生在一個小村莊，但在童年時搬到了城市。

borrow.example_en: Can I borrow your pen since I forgot to bring mine today?
borrow.example_zh: 我可以借你的筆嗎，因為我今天忘記帶我的了。

boss.example_en: My boss asked me to finish the project before Friday afternoon.
boss.example_zh: 我的上司要求我在週五下午之前完成這個項目。

both.example_en: Both of my sisters love sports but prefer different kinds of games.
both.example_zh: 我的兩個姐妹都喜歡運動，但喜歡不同類型的運動。

bother.example_en: I didn't bother to call him because he was sleeping peacefully.
bother.example_zh: 我沒有費心去打電話給他，因為他睡得很安穩。

bottle.example_en: She filled the plastic bottle with cold water before going to the beach.
bottle.example_zh: 她在去海邊前用冷水裝滿了塑膠瓶。

bottom.example_en: There were some coins at the bottom of the old wooden box.
bottom.example_zh: 舊木盒的底部有幾個硬幣。

bow.example_en: He gave a respectful bow when meeting the elderly teacher.
bow.example_zh: 見到年長的老師時，他敬禮鞠躬。

bowl.example_en: She poured the hot soup carefully into a small ceramic bowl.
bowl.example_zh: 她小心地把熱湯倒進一個小瓷碗裡。

bowling.example_en: Last weekend, my friends and I went bowling at the recreation center.
bowling.example_zh: 上週末，我和朋友們在休閒中心去打保齡球。

box.example_en: The moving company packed all our belongings into large cardboard boxes.
box.example_zh: 搬家公司把我們所有的物品裝進大紙箱裡。

boy.example_en: The young boy was excited to see the dolphins at the aquarium.
boy.example_zh: 小男孩在水族館看到海豚時興奮不已。

brain.example_en: Solving difficult math problems exercises your brain in many different ways.
brain.example_zh: 解難數學題可以用多種方式鍛鍊你的大腦。

branch.example_en: Our company opened a new branch in the downtown shopping district last month.
branch.example_zh: 我們公司上個月在市區購物區開設了新分店。

brand.example_en: She preferred that famous sports brand because of its high quality products.
brand.example_zh: 因為產品品質好，她更喜歡那個著名的運動品牌。

brave.example_en: The brave firefighters rescued the family trapped inside the burning house.
brave.example_zh: 勇敢的消防員救出了被困在燃燒房屋裡的家人。

bread.example_en: Every morning, my grandmother bakes fresh bread for our family breakfast.
bread.example_zh: 每天早上，我祖母都為家人烤新鮮麵包。

break.definition: 破碎，破裂；打破；打斷；損壞，弄壞
break.example_en: My brother accidentally broke the glass vase when he was playing.
break.example_zh: 我哥哥玩耍時不小心打破了玻璃花瓶。

breakfast.example_en: We had a quick breakfast of eggs and toast before leaving for school.
breakfast.example_zh: 上學前，我們快速吃了蛋和土司當早餐。

brick.definition: 磚頭（指無法使用的電子設備，如智慧型手機）
brick.example_en: When my old phone completely stopped working, it became a useless brick.
brick.example_zh: 當我的舊手機完全停止運作時，它變成了一塊廢磚。

bridge.example_en: The new bridge across the river connects our town to the neighboring city.
bridge.example_zh: 河上的新橋樑把我們的鎮與鄰近城市連接起來。

brief.example_en: The teacher gave us a brief explanation before we started the assignment.
brief.example_zh: 在我們開始作業前，老師給了我們簡短的說明。

bright.example_en: The bright sunlight streamed through the classroom windows on the sunny morning.
bright.example_zh: 晴朗的早晨，明亮的陽光透過教室窗戶灑進來。

bring.example_en: Please bring your homework to class tomorrow or your teacher will be upset.
bring.example_zh: 請明天把你的功課帶到課堂，否則老師會不高興。

broad.example_en: The broad smile on her face showed she was very happy about the result.
broad.example_zh: 她臉上寬闊的笑容表明她對結果非常滿意。

broadcast.definition: 廣播（電視或無線電節目）;播送
broadcast.example_en: The football match was broadcast live on television last Saturday night.
broadcast.example_zh: 上週六晚上足球比賽在電視上直播了。

brother.example_en: My brother helps me with my homework when I don't understand difficult problems.
brother.example_zh: 當我不懂難題時，我哥哥會幫我做功課。

brown.example_en: He wore brown shoes with his suit to the important business meeting today.
brown.example_zh: 他穿著褐色的鞋子和西裝去參加今天的重要商務會議。

brunch.example_en: We enjoyed brunch together at the new café near the school on Sunday.
brunch.example_zh: 週日我們一起在學校附近的新咖啡館享用了早午餐。

brush.example_en: The artist used a fine brush to paint the small details in her watercolor painting.
brush.example_zh: 藝術家用細筆刷在她的水彩畫上畫出細節。

bucket.example_en: She carried a bucket of water to clean the windows of the classroom.
bucket.example_zh: 她提著一桶水來清洗教室的窗戶。

buffet.example_en: The birthday party had a buffet with many different kinds of delicious food.
buffet.example_zh: 生日派對上有自助餐，有很多不同種類的美食。

bug.example_en: A small bug landed on my arm while I was sitting in the garden.
bug.example_zh: 當我坐在花園裡時，一隻小蟲子落在我的手臂上。

build.example_en: The construction company will build a new shopping mall in our neighborhood next year.
build.example_zh: 建築公司明年將在我們的社區建造一個新的購物中心。

building.example_en: The tall building across from the park is where my uncle works as a manager.
building.example_zh: 公園對面的高樓是我叔叔作為經理工作的地方。

bun.example_en: For breakfast today, I had a chocolate bun and a cup of hot milk.
bun.example_zh: 今天早餐我吃了一個巧克力小圓麵包和一杯熱牛奶。

bundle.example_en: The postman delivered a bundle of magazines and newspapers to our house today.
bundle.example_zh: 郵差今天給我們家送來了一束雜誌和報紙。

burn.definition: （把…）燒壞;（使）燒傷;（使）燒毀;（使）曬傷;（使）燙傷
burn.example_en: Be careful not to burn yourself when you take the hot pizza out of the oven.
burn.example_zh: 從烤箱裡拿出熱披薩時要小心不要燙傷自己。

burst.example_en: The balloon burst loudly when the puppy jumped on it during the birthday party.
burst.example_zh: 當小狗在生日派對上跳在氣球上時，氣球大聲爆破了。

bus.example_en: I take the bus to school every morning because my house is quite far.
bus.example_zh: 我每天早上乘公車上學，因為我的家相當遠。

business.example_en: My father has been in the restaurant business for more than fifteen years.
business.example_zh: 我父親從事餐飲生意已經超過十五年了。

businessman.definition: （尤指公司高層的）商界人士;實業家
businessman.example_en: The successful businessman always got up early and planned his day very carefully.
businessman.example_zh: 這位成功的實業家總是早起，並且非常仔細地計劃他的一天。

busy.example_en: My mother was too busy with work to attend my school sports day last week.
busy.example_zh: 我媽媽上週忙於工作，無法參加我的學校運動會。

but.example_en: I wanted to go to the party, but I had to stay home and study instead.
but.example_zh: 我想去派對，但我必須留在家裡學習。

butter.example_en: She spread butter on her toast for breakfast.
butter.example_zh: 她在早餐吐司上抹了一些奶油。

butterfly.example_en: A beautiful butterfly flew past my bedroom window this morning.
butterfly.example_zh: 一隻美麗的蝴蝶在今早飛過我的臥室窗戶。

button.example_en: The button on your jacket is about to fall off.
button.example_zh: 你夾克上的鈕扣快要掉下來了。

buy.example_en: I want to buy a new backpack for school next month.
buy.example_zh: 我想下個月為學校買一個新背包。

by.definition: （用於表示動作的施動者）被，由
by.example_en: The picture was painted by a very famous artist many years ago.
by.example_zh: 這幅畫是由一位非常著名的藝術家多年前繪製的。

cabbage.example_en: My mother added cabbage to the soup to make it healthier.
cabbage.example_zh: 我媽媽在湯裡加了捲心菜讓它更健康。

cable.example_en: The cable connecting the computer to the printer was broken.
cable.example_zh: 連接電腦和打印機的電纜壞了。

cafeteria.definition: （常指工廠、大學或辦公大樓內的）自助餐廳，自助食堂
cafeteria.example_en: The school cafeteria serves lunch every weekday from noon to one.
cafeteria.example_zh: 學校自助餐廳每個工作日從中午到一點提供午餐。

cage.example_en: The pet store kept the birds inside a large metal cage.
cage.example_zh: 寵物店把鳥放在一個大金屬籠子裡。

cake.example_en: My grandmother bakes a chocolate cake for my birthday every year.
cake.example_zh: 我奶奶每年都為我的生日烤一個巧克力蛋糕。

calendar.example_en: I marked all the important dates on my wall calendar.
calendar.example_zh: 我在牆上的日曆上標記了所有重要的日期。

call.example_en: They call him Jack, but his real name is Jackson.
call.example_zh: 他們叫他傑克，但他的真名是傑克遜。

calm.example_en: The teacher stayed calm even when all the students were very noisy.
calm.example_zh: 即使所有學生都很吵，老師仍然保持冷靜。

camera.example_en: She brought a camera to take photos at the school field day.
camera.example_zh: 她帶了一台相機去學校運動會拍照。

camp.example_en: Last summer, my brother went to camp for two weeks.
camp.example_zh: 去年夏天，我的哥哥去宿營兩個星期。

campus.example_en: The university campus has many buildings and green areas for students.
campus.example_zh: 大學校園有許多建築物和供學生使用的綠地。

can.example_en: After taking swimming lessons, I can swim faster than before.
can.example_zh: 上了游泳課後，我能比以前游得更快了。

cancel.example_en: The concert was cancelled because the singer got sick.
cancel.example_zh: 演唱會因為歌手生病而被取消了。

cancer.example_en: The doctor said the patient recovered well from cancer treatment.
cancer.example_zh: 醫生說患者從癌症治療中恢復得很好。

candle.example_en: During the power cut, we lit a candle to see inside the room.
candle.example_zh: 停電期間，我們點了一根蠟燭來照亮房間。

candy.definition: 糖果;巧克力;一塊糖（或巧克力）
candy.example_en: My little sister always asks for candy when we go to the supermarket together.
candy.example_zh: 我妹妹每次去超市時總是要求買糖果。

cap.example_en: He wears a baseball cap on sunny days to protect his head from the sun.
cap.example_zh: 他在晴天戴棒球帽來保護頭部不被陽光曬傷。

captain.example_en: The team captain encouraged his players before the important basketball game started.
captain.example_zh: 隊長在重要籃球賽開始前鼓勵他的隊員。

car.example_en: My father drives his car to work every morning at seven o'clock.
car.example_zh: 我父親每天早上七點開著他的車去工作。

card.definition: （顯示個人資料的）卡片；銀行卡；通行證
card.example_en: She kept her credit card safely in her wallet during the shopping trip.
card.example_zh: 她在購物時把信用卡安全地放在錢包裡。

care.example_en: The nurse cared for the patient in the hospital with kindness and patience.
care.example_zh: 護士在醫院以善良和耐心照顧病人。

careful.example_en: A careful driver always checks the mirrors before changing lanes on the highway.
careful.example_zh: 細心的駕駛者在高速公路上變道前總是檢查後視鏡。

careless.definition: 不小心的；粗心的，馬虎的
careless.example_en: The careless student forgot his homework at home and received a lower mark.
careless.example_zh: 粗心的學生把作業忘在家裡，因此得到了更低的分數。

carpet.example_en: The soft carpet in the living room makes the room feel warm and comfortable.
carpet.example_zh: 客廳的柔軟地毯讓房間感覺溫暖舒適。

carrot.example_en: My mother added fresh carrots to the vegetable soup for better nutrition and taste.
carrot.example_zh: 我媽媽在蔬菜湯裡加入新鮮胡蘿蔔來增加營養和風味。

carry.example_en: He carried heavy boxes up the stairs to move into his new apartment.
carry.example_zh: 他把沉重的箱子扛上樓梯搬進新公寓。

cartoon.definition: （尤指報刊中與政治有關的）漫畫，諷刺畫
cartoon.example_en: Children love watching colorful cartoons on television every weekend afternoon.
cartoon.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在週末下午看電視上色彩繽紛的動畫。

case.example_en: In this case, we should ask the teacher for help with the difficult problem.
case.example_zh: 在這種情況下，我們應該向老師尋求關於難題的幫助。

cash.example_en: He paid cash for his new bicycle instead of using a credit card.
cash.example_zh: 他用現金而不是信用卡購買他的新自行車。

cassette.definition: 盒式錄音（或錄影）帶;盒式錄音（或錄影）機
cassette.example_en: My grandmother still listens to her favorite music on old cassette tapes at home.
cassette.example_zh: 我祖母在家仍然用舊盒式錄音帶聽她最喜歡的音樂。

castle.example_en: The ancient castle on the hilltop attracts thousands of tourists every single year.
castle.example_zh: 山頂上的古老城堡每年吸引成千上萬的遊客。

cat.example_en: My black cat sleeps all day and becomes active only at night.
cat.example_zh: 我的黑貓白天睡覺，只在晚上才活躍。

catch.example_en: The outfielder caught the flying baseball before it hit the ground.
catch.example_zh: 外野手在球落地前抓住了飛行中的棒球。

cause.definition: （尤指不好的事情發生的）原因，起因
cause.example_en: The main cause of the accident was the driver's excessive speed on the road.
cause.example_zh: 事故的主要原因是駕駛員在路上速度過快。

ceiling.example_en: The painter carefully painted the white ceiling in every room of the house.
ceiling.example_zh: 油漆工小心地在房子的每個房間裡粉刷白色天花板。

celebrate.example_en: My family always celebrates my birthday with a special dinner and cake.
celebrate.example_zh: 我的家人總是用特別的晚餐和蛋糕慶祝我的生日。

cell.example_en: The cell is the smallest living unit that makes up all living things.
cell.example_zh: 細胞是組成所有生物的最小生活單位。

cent.example_en: This candy costs only ninety-nine cents, so I can afford it.
cent.example_zh: 這個糖果只要九十九美分，所以我買得起。

center.example_en: The shopping center downtown has many stores and restaurants.
center.example_zh: 市中心的購物中心有很多商店和餐廳。

centimeter.example_en: My ruler shows measurements in both centimeters and inches.
centimeter.example_zh: 我的尺子上既顯示公分，也顯示英寸的測量單位。

central.definition: 中心的，中央的；中部的；靠近中心的；核心的
central.example_en: The central library in our city is very large and has many books.
central.example_zh: 我們城市的中央圖書館很大，書籍很多。

century.example_en: A century is a period of one hundred years in history.
century.example_zh: 一個世紀是歷史上一百年的時間段。

cereal.example_en: I eat a bowl of cereal with milk every morning for breakfast.
cereal.example_zh: 我每天早上吃一碗穀類麥片和牛奶作為早餐。

certain.definition: 肯定的，無疑的；有把握的；確定的
certain.example_en: I am certain that I locked the door before leaving home.
certain.example_zh: 我確定離家前我已經鎖好了門。

chair.example_en: I pulled a chair from the table and sat down to eat lunch.
chair.example_zh: 我從桌子旁拉過一把椅子，坐下來吃午餐。

chalk.example_en: The teacher used white chalk to write the math problem on the board.
chalk.example_zh: 老師用白色粉筆在黑板上寫數學題。

chance.example_en: I finally got a chance to meet my favorite singer at the concert.
chance.example_zh: 我終於在演唱會上有機會見到我最喜歡的歌手。

change.example_en: I decided to change my hairstyle because I wanted something different.
change.example_zh: 我決定改變髮型，因為我想要不同的樣子。

channel.example_en: My brother watches cartoons on his favorite channel every Saturday morning.
channel.example_zh: 我的弟弟每個星期六早上都在他最喜歡的頻道看卡通。

character.example_en: Her kind character and friendly personality make her popular with everyone.
character.example_zh: 她善良的性格和友善的個性使她受到大家歡迎。

charge.definition: （尤指對某一服務或活動）收費，要價，開價
charge.example_en: The restaurant doesn't charge extra money for ice water or extra napkins.
charge.example_zh: 餐廳不會對冰水或額外餐巾紙額外收費。

chart.example_en: The weather chart shows that it will rain heavily this weekend.
chart.example_zh: 天氣圖表顯示這個週末會下大雨。

chase.example_en: The dog chased the cat through the garden until it jumped over the fence.
chase.example_zh: 狗追著貓跑過花園，直到貓跳過圍欄。

cheap.example_en: This secondhand bookstore sells cheap books, so I often shop there.
cheap.example_zh: 這家二手書店賣便宜的書，所以我經常在那裡購物。

cheat.example_en: Some students tried to cheat on the exam, but the teacher caught them.
cheat.example_zh: 有些學生試圖在考試中作弊，但被老師發現了。

check.example_en: The teacher will check all the students' homework before the class starts.
check.example_zh: 老師會在上課前檢查所有學生的功課。

cheer.example_en: The fans cheered loudly when their team scored the winning goal.
cheer.example_zh: 當他們的隊伍進球得分時，球迷大聲歡呼。

cheese.example_en: I like to put cheese on my pizza before baking it.
cheese.example_zh: 我喜歡在烤披薩前加上乳酪。

chemical.example_en: The swimming pool uses chemical solutions to keep the water clean.
chemical.example_zh: 游泳池用化學溶液來保持水的清潔。

chess.example_en: My grandfather taught me how to play chess when I was young.
chess.example_zh: 我爺爺在我小的時候教我玩西洋棋。

chicken.example_en: For dinner tonight, we are having roasted chicken with vegetables.
chicken.example_zh: 今晚晚餐我們吃烤雞配蔬菜。

chief.definition: 首要的；最重要的；最主要的
chief.example_en: The chief reason for his success was his hard work and dedication.
chief.example_zh: 他成功的主要原因是他的努力和奉獻。

child.example_en: Every child in the neighborhood loves to play in the park.
child.example_zh: 鄰近的每個小孩都喜歡在公園裡玩。

childish.example_en: His childish behavior made everyone in the class laugh at him.
childish.example_zh: 他幼稚的行為讓全班都在嘲笑他。

childlike.definition: （成人）孩子般的，單純的，純真無邪的
childlike.example_en: The old woman had a childlike innocence and love for simple things.
childlike.example_zh: 這位老婦人有著孩子般的純真和對簡單事物的喜愛。

chin.example_en: When he thinks hard, he always rests his chin on his hand.
chin.example_zh: 當他深思時，他總是用手托著下巴。

chocolate.example_en: My sister loves to eat chocolate cake on her birthday.
chocolate.example_zh: 我妹妹喜歡在生日時吃巧克力蛋糕。

choice.example_en: You have three different choices for the main course at dinner.
choice.example_zh: 你有三種不同的主菜選擇。

choose.example_en: I need to choose between playing basketball or doing my homework today.
choose.example_zh: 我今天需要在打籃球和做功課之間選擇。

chopstick.example_en: In Taiwan, people usually use chopsticks to eat rice and other dishes.
chopstick.example_zh: 在台灣，人們通常用筷子吃飯和其他菜餚。

christmas.example_en: Many families decorate their homes beautifully during the Christmas season.
christmas.example_zh: 許多家庭在聖誕節期間把家裡裝飾得很漂亮。

chubby.definition: （尤指兒童）圓圓胖胖的，胖乎乎的，豐滿的
chubby.example_en: The chubby baby laughed happily when his mother tickled his stomach.
chubby.example_zh: 胖乎乎的嬰兒在媽媽搔癢他的肚子時開心地笑著。

church.example_en: On Sunday mornings, many people go to church to pray and worship.
church.example_zh: 星期天早上，許多人去教堂祈禱和敬拜。

circle.example_en: The teacher asked all students to stand in a circle.
circle.example_zh: 老師要求所有學生站成一個圓圈。

city.example_en: Tokyo is a large city with millions of people living there.
city.example_zh: 東京是一個有數百萬人口居住的大城市。

claim.example_en: The student claimed he had finished his homework, but the teacher didn't believe him.
claim.example_zh: 學生聲稱他已經做完功課，但老師不相信他。

clap.example_en: Everyone clapped loudly after the singer performed the beautiful song.
clap.example_zh: 歌手唱完這首優美的歌曲後，大家都熱烈鼓掌。

class.example_en: I have math class right after lunch on Monday.
class.example_zh: 我星期一午餐後馬上有數學課。

classic.example_en: That old movie is considered a classic film that everyone should watch.
classic.example_zh: 那部老電影被認為是一部經典電影，每個人都應該看。

classmate.example_en: My classmate helped me understand the difficult chemistry problem.
classmate.example_zh: 我的同班同學幫我理解了那道難的化學題。

classroom.example_en: The classroom was very quiet while students were taking their English test.
classroom.example_zh: 學生考英文時，教室裡非常安靜。

clay.example_en: In art class, we used clay to create small sculptures.
clay.example_zh: 在藝術課上，我們用黏土製作小雕塑。

clean.example_en: My mother asked me to make sure my room is clean before my friends arrive.
clean.example_zh: 媽媽要求我在朋友來之前確保房間乾淨。

clear.definition: 明白的;清楚的;易懂的;清晰的
clear.example_en: The teacher gave clear instructions so all students could understand the task.
clear.example_zh: 老師給了清楚的指示，所以所有學生都能理解這項任務。

clerk.example_en: The clerk at the library helped me find the book I was looking for.
clerk.example_zh: 圖書館的職員幫我找到了我要找的書。

clever.example_en: She came up with a clever solution to solve the problem quickly.
clever.example_zh: 她想出了一個聰明的辦法，迅速解決了問題。

climate.example_en: The tropical climate makes it hot and humid throughout the entire year.
climate.example_zh: 熱帶氣候使得全年都很熱且潮濕。

climb.example_en: The hikers climbed to the top of the mountain before sunset.
climb.example_zh: 登山者在日落前爬到了山頂。

clock.example_en: I always check the clock to make sure I'm not late for school.
clock.example_zh: 我經常看時鐘，確保不會遲到上學。

close.example_en: Please close the window before you leave the house.
close.example_zh: 離開房子前，請關上窗戶。

closet.definition: （尤指放衣服的）壁櫥，壁櫃，儲藏室
closet.example_en: I opened my closet this morning but couldn't find anything to wear.
closet.example_zh: 我今天早上打開壁櫃，卻找不到穿的衣服。

clothes.example_en: She packed her winter clothes before traveling to the snowy mountain.
clothes.example_zh: 她在前往雪山旅行前收拾了冬衣。

cloud.definition: 一團（塵土、煙霧等）;雲狀物
cloud.example_en: A large cloud blocked the sun and made the afternoon cooler.
cloud.example_zh: 一朵大雲遮住了太陽，使下午涼爽了起來。

club.example_en: I joined the school's basketball club to improve my skills.
club.example_zh: 我加入了學校的籃球社團來提高我的技能。

coach.definition: 教練;輔導老師;私人教師;家庭教師
coach.example_en: My swimming coach teaches me proper technique every afternoon after school.
coach.example_zh: 我的游泳教練每天放學後教我正確的技巧。

coast.example_en: The beach town on the coast attracts many tourists every summer.
coast.example_zh: 海岸上的海灘小鎮每個夏天都吸引許多遊客。

coat.definition: （通常指保暖的）外套，外衣，大衣
coat.example_en: She put on her warm coat before going outside in the snow.
coat.example_zh: 她穿上溫暖的外套後才走到雪地外面。

cockroach.example_en: I saw a cockroach running across the kitchen floor last night.
cockroach.example_zh: 昨晚我看到一隻蟑螂在廚房地板上爬過。

coffee.example_en: My dad drinks a cup of coffee every morning before work.
coffee.example_zh: 我爸爸每天早上上班前喝一杯咖啡。

coin.example_en: I found a coin on the ground while walking home yesterday.
coin.example_zh: 昨天走路回家時我在地上發現一枚硬幣。

coke.example_en: The factory produces coke for use in steel manufacturing processes.
coke.example_zh: 這家工廠生產焦煤供鋼鐵製造過程使用。

cold.definition: （尤指相對於體溫而言）冷的，寒冷的，溫度低的
cold.example_en: The water in the lake is too cold to swim in now.
cold.example_zh: 湖裡的水太冷了，現在不能游泳。

collect.example_en: My brother collects stamps from different countries around the world.
collect.example_zh: 我哥哥從世界各國收集郵票。

college.example_en: After high school, she wants to go to college to study medicine.
college.example_zh: 高中畢業後，她想上大學學習醫學。

color.example_en: The sunset displayed a beautiful color that filled the whole sky.
color.example_zh: 日落展現出一種填滿整個天空的美麗顏色。

colorful.example_en: The market was filled with colorful flowers and fresh vegetables.
colorful.example_zh: 市場裡裝滿了五彩繽紛的花卉和新鮮蔬菜。

comb.example_en: She used a comb to brush her hair before the party.
comb.example_zh: 派對前她用梳子梳理她的頭髮。

come.example_en: Can you come to my house tomorrow to help me study?
come.example_zh: 你明天能來我家幫我讀書嗎？

comfortable.definition: （傢俱和衣服）舒適的，舒服的，令人愜意的
comfortable.example_en: This chair is very comfortable for sitting and reading for hours.
comfortable.example_zh: 這張椅子坐著讀書好幾個小時都很舒適。

command.example_en: The teacher commanded the students to sit down and be quiet.
command.example_zh: 老師命令學生們坐下保持安靜。

comment.example_en: The teacher gave helpful comments on my essay about friendship.
comment.example_zh: 老師對我關於友誼的文章給了有幫助的評論。

common.definition: 常見的；經常的；普遍的；普通的；平常的
common.example_en: Smartphones are common among teenagers in Taiwan these days.
common.example_zh: 在台灣，智慧型手機在青少年中很普遍。

company.example_en: My mother works at a technology company in the downtown area.
company.example_zh: 我媽媽在市中心的一家科技公司工作。

compare.example_en: Let's compare these two books to see which one is better.
compare.example_zh: 讓我們比較這兩本書，看看哪一本更好。

complain.example_en: My friend often complains about the crowded buses during rush hour.
complain.example_zh: 我朋友經常抱怨高峰時段擁擠的公車。

complaint.example_en: My main complaint about the restaurant is that the service was too slow.
complaint.example_zh: 我對這家餐廳最大的抱怨是服務太慢了。

complete.example_en: She gave us a complete explanation of how the project would work.
complete.example_zh: 她給我們完整詳細的專案計畫說明。

computer.example_en: My computer crashed yesterday, so I had to restart it several times.
computer.example_zh: 我的電腦昨天當機，所以我必須重新啟動好幾次。

concern.example_en: Her main concern about the field trip was whether everyone would stay safe.
concern.example_zh: 她對校外教學最主要的擔憂是每個人是否都會安全。

confident.definition: 自信的；有信心的；確信的；有把握的；信任的
confident.example_en: He felt confident that he would pass the English test after studying hard.
confident.example_zh: 經過認真讀書，他對英文考試很有信心。

conflict.example_en: There was a serious conflict between the two teams during the basketball game.
conflict.example_zh: 籃球比賽中兩支隊伍之間發生了一場嚴重的衝突。

confuse.example_en: The unclear instructions confused most of the students in the class.
confuse.example_zh: 那些不清楚的指示讓班上大多數學生感到困惑。

congratulation.example_en: She received a congratulation letter from the school for winning the science competition.
congratulation.example_zh: 她因為贏得科學比賽而收到學校的祝賀信。

connect.example_en: The new bridge will connect two small towns on opposite sides of the river.
connect.example_zh: 新橋樑將連接河對岸的兩個小鎮。

consider.example_en: Before making a decision, you should consider all the possible options carefully.
consider.example_zh: 做決定前，你應該仔細考慮所有可能的選項。

considerate.example_en: My considerate neighbor always returns borrowed items quickly and never makes late-night noise.
considerate.example_zh: 我體貼的鄰居總是快速歸還借用的物品，從不深夜製造噪音。

contact.definition: （尤指經常透過交談、書信的）聯繫，聯絡，交往
contact.example_en: You can contact customer service if you have any questions about your order.
contact.example_zh: 如果對訂單有任何問題，你可以聯繫客服團隊。

continue.example_en: The concert will continue after a short break for the performers to rest.
continue.example_zh: 演唱會在表演者短暫休息後將繼續進行。

contract.example_en: Both companies signed a contract to work together on the new project.
contract.example_zh: 兩家公司簽署了合約共同進行新專案。

control.example_en: The driver must control the car carefully when driving on a slippery road.
control.example_zh: 駕駛在濕滑的道路上開車時必須控制好車輛。

convenient.example_en: This store is very convenient because it is located right near my house.
convenient.example_zh: 這家店非常方便，因為它就位在我家附近。

conversation.example_en: I had an interesting conversation with my friend about her travel plans.
conversation.example_zh: 我和朋友有過一次有趣的談話，討論她的旅行計畫。

cook.example_en: My mother cooks delicious meals for our family every single day.
cook.example_zh: 我媽媽每天為我們家人烹飪美味的飯菜。

cookie.example_en: The baker made chocolate chip cookies that sold out in just two hours.
cookie.example_zh: 烘焙師傅製作的巧克力餅乾在兩個小時內就賣完了。

cool.example_en: On hot summer days, a cool glass of lemonade tastes wonderful.
cool.example_zh: 在炎熱的夏日，一杯冰檸檬水喝起來非常美味。

copy.example_en: You should not copy your friend's homework without understanding the answers first.
copy.example_zh: 你不應該在沒有理解答案前就抄你朋友的功課。

corn.definition: （小麥、玉米、燕麥、大麥等）穀物，穀粒
corn.example_en: The farmer grows corn in his fields every summer season.
corn.example_zh: 那位農夫每個夏天都在田裡種玉米。

corner.example_en: The small shop sits at the corner of Main Street and Oak Avenue.
corner.example_zh: 那家小店位在主街和橡樹大道的轉角處。

correct.example_en: Maria's answer was correct and she got full marks on the test.
correct.example_zh: 瑪麗亞的答案是正確的，她在考試上得到滿分。

cost.example_en: A new bicycle will cost you around five thousand dollars.
cost.example_zh: 一輛新自行車要花你大約五千塊錢。

cotton.example_en: My grandmother prefers cotton shirts because they feel soft on her skin.
cotton.example_zh: 我奶奶喜歡棉質襯衫，因為穿起來對皮膚很柔軟。

couch.example_en: After watching the movie, he fell asleep on the couch.
couch.example_zh: 看完電影後，他在沙發上睡著了。

cough.example_en: When I catch a cold, I usually cough for about two weeks.
cough.example_zh: 當我感冒時，通常會咳嗽大約兩個禮拜。

count.example_en: The children count from one to ten before playing hide and seek.
count.example_zh: 小孩在玩躲貓貓前從一數到十。

country.example_en: Japan is a beautiful country with mountains and ancient temples.
country.example_zh: 日本是一個美麗的國家，有許多山脈和古老的寺廟。

couple.definition: （相似或相同事物的）一對，一雙，幾個;（有某種聯繫之人的）一對，幾個
couple.example_en: I bought a couple of notebooks for school yesterday.
couple.example_zh: 我昨天為上學買了幾本筆記本。

courage.example_en: It took a lot of courage for her to perform solo on stage.
courage.example_zh: 她獨自在舞台上表演需要很大的勇氣。

course.example_en: She enrolled in a Spanish course to improve her language skills.
course.example_zh: 她報名參加了西班牙語課程來提高語言能力。

court.definition: 法院;法庭;全體出庭人員;（尤指）全體審判人員
court.example_en: The judge in the court decided the case after hearing both sides.
court.example_zh: 法庭上的法官在聽取雙方意見後做出了判決。

cousin.definition: 堂（或表）兄弟;堂（或表）姐妹;遠房親戚
cousin.example_en: My cousin and I play together every weekend at family gatherings.
cousin.example_zh: 我和我的表哥在家庭聚會時每個週末都一起玩。

cover.example_en: She covered the plants with plastic to protect them from frost.
cover.example_zh: 她用塑膠蓋住植物以保護它們免受霜凍。

cow.example_en: A cow gives milk, which we use to make cheese and yogurt.
cow.example_zh: 母牛產牛奶，我們用它來製作起司和優格。

cowboy.example_en: In the old Western film, the cowboy rode his horse across the desert.
cowboy.example_zh: 在那部舊西部電影裡，牛仔騎著馬穿過沙漠。

crab.example_en: The children found a small crab hiding under the rocks at the beach.
crab.example_zh: 小孩在海灘上的岩石下發現了一隻小螃蟹。

crayon.example_en: My little sister drew a rainbow with colorful crayons on white paper.
crayon.example_zh: 我妹妹用彩色蠟筆在白紙上畫了一道彩虹。

crazy.example_en: That crazy plan to build a house underwater will never actually work.
crazy.example_zh: 那個在水下建房子的荒唐計畫永遠不會成功。

cream.example_en: My grandmother spread thick cream on her warm toast every single morning.
cream.example_zh: 我的祖母每天早上都在溫熱的吐司上塗厚厚的鮮奶油。

create.example_en: The artist used paint and brush to create beautiful pictures on canvas.
create.example_zh: 藝術家用油漆和刷子在畫布上創作美麗的圖畫。

crime.example_en: The police arrested someone for committing a crime in the neighborhood.
crime.example_zh: 警察逮捕了一個在社區裡犯罪的人。

cruel.definition: 殘忍的;殘酷的;刻毒傷人的
cruel.example_en: It is cruel to ignore someone's feelings when they are very sad.
cruel.example_zh: 當別人傷心時無視他們的感受是很殘忍的。

cry.example_en: The little boy began to cry when he could not find his toy.
cry.example_zh: 那個小男孩找不到他的玩具時開始哭起來。

culture.definition: 文化（尤指某一群體在某一時期普遍的風俗習慣和信仰）
culture.example_en: Japanese culture includes traditions like wearing kimono and tea ceremony.
culture.example_zh: 日本文化包括穿著和服和茶道這樣的傳統。

cup.example_en: I poured hot tea into my favorite ceramic cup before breakfast.
cup.example_zh: 我在早餐前把熱茶倒進我最喜歡的陶瓷杯裡。

cure.example_en: Scientists are searching for a cure to help people with this disease.
cure.example_zh: 科學家們正在尋找治癒這種疾病的方法。

curious.example_en: The curious child asked many questions about how the machine works.
curious.example_zh: 那個好奇的小孩問了很多關於機器如何工作的問題。

current.example_en: The current weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow afternoon.
current.example_zh: 目前的天氣預報說明天下午會下雨。

curtain.example_en: She closed the thick curtain to make the room darker and quieter.
curtain.example_zh: 她拉上厚重的窗簾讓房間變得更暗更安靜。

curve.example_en: The road made a sharp curve at the bottom of the mountain.
curve.example_zh: 那條路在山腳下有一個急轉彎。

custom.example_en: It is a Chinese custom to give red envelopes during the New Year.
custom.example_zh: 在新年期間給紅包是一個中國習俗。

customer.example_en: The store owner greeted each customer with a warm smile and kind words.
customer.example_zh: 店主用溫暖的笑容和親切的話語問候每位顧客。

cut.example_en: Please cut the bread into even pieces so everyone gets the same size.
cut.example_zh: 請把麵包切成均勻的塊，這樣每個人都能得到相同的大小。

cute.definition: （尤指小東西或小孩）可愛的，嬌小可愛的，逗人喜愛的
cute.example_en: The cute rabbit hopped around the garden and made all the children laugh.
cute.example_zh: 那隻可愛的兔子在花園裡跳來跳去，逗得所有小孩都笑了。

damage.example_en: The earthquake damaged many buildings and left thousands of people homeless.
damage.example_zh: 地震損毀了許多建築物，使數千人無家可歸。

dance.example_en: They danced happily together at the celebration until late midnight.
dance.example_zh: 他們在慶祝活動上開心地一起跳舞直到午夜。

danger.example_en: Swimming in deep ocean water without a guide can be a serious danger.
danger.example_zh: 沒有導遊在深海裡游泳可能是一個很大的危險。

dangerous.definition: 危險的，有威脅的;不安全的
dangerous.example_en: Swimming alone in deep water is very dangerous for young children.
dangerous.example_zh: 獨自在深水裡游泳對小孩來說非常危險。

dark.example_en: The old library becomes very dark when the lights turn off.
dark.example_zh: 當燈熄滅時，老圖書館變得非常昏暗。

data.example_en: The scientist collected data from hundreds of plants over three years.
data.example_zh: 科學家從數百株植物收集了三年的資料。

date.example_en: Please write the date at the top of your homework paper.
date.example_zh: 請在你的功課紙上方寫下日期。

daughter.example_en: His daughter wants to become a teacher like her mother someday.
daughter.example_zh: 他的女兒將來想成為像媽媽一樣的老師。

dawn.example_en: The farmer wakes up at dawn every morning to work on his farm.
dawn.example_zh: 農民每天拂曉時起床去農場工作。

day.example_en: My favorite day of the week is Saturday because I can sleep late.
day.example_zh: 我最喜歡的一周中的日子是星期六，因為我可以睡懶覺。

dead.example_en: The old tree is completely dead and cannot produce any new leaves anymore.
dead.example_zh: 那棵老樹完全死了，再也不能長出新葉子。

deaf.definition: 耳聾的，聽不見的，失聰的
deaf.example_en: My grandfather became deaf in one ear after a serious accident.
deaf.example_zh: 我的爺爺在一場嚴重的事故後，一隻耳朵變聾了。

deal.example_en: The two companies finally made a deal to work together on the project.
deal.example_zh: 兩家公司最後達成協議一起合作這個項目。

dear.example_en: She keeps her dear grandmother's letters in a special box under her bed.
dear.example_zh: 她把親愛的奶奶的信放在床下的一個特殊盒子裡。

death.example_en: The news of his sudden death shocked everyone in the small village.
death.example_zh: 他突然去世的消息震驚了小村莊裡的每個人。

debate.example_en: The two candidates had a heated debate about education policy on television.
debate.example_zh: 兩位候選人在電視上進行了關於教育政策的激烈辯論。

december.example_en: December is my favorite month because Christmas and winter break are coming soon.
december.example_zh: 十二月是我最喜歡的月份，因為聖誕節和寒假快到了。

decide.definition: （尤指仔細考慮後）決定，決斷，確定
decide.example_en: After thinking about it carefully, she decided to study medicine instead of law.
decide.example_zh: 仔細考慮後，她決定學醫學而不是法律。

decision.example_en: Making the right decision about your future is not always easy for teenagers.
decision.example_zh: 為你的未來做出正確的決定對青少年來說並不總是容易的。

decorate.example_en: My sister and I decorated our room with colorful posters and string lights yesterday.
decorate.example_zh: 昨天我和妹妹用五彩的海報和彩燈裝飾了我們的房間。

decrease.example_en: The number of students taking the bus has decreased since the school opened a new parking lot.
decrease.example_zh: 自從學校開放了新停車場後，坐公車的學生人數減少了。

deep.definition: 深的，向下延伸的；有…深的
deep.example_en: The ocean is very deep, and most of the creatures living there are unknown.
deep.example_zh: 海洋非常深，大多數住在那裡的生物都是未知的。

deer.example_en: We saw three beautiful deer walking through the forest near our cabin.
deer.example_zh: 我們在小木屋附近的森林裡看到三隻美麗的鹿在走動。

degree.example_en: The danger of the storm reached a high degree during the afternoon.
degree.example_zh: 暴風雨的危險程度在下午時達到了高峰。

delicious.definition: 美味的;（味道或氣味）誘人的
delicious.example_en: My mom's pizza was so delicious that I ate three slices at dinner.
delicious.example_zh: 媽媽做的披薩非常美味，我在晚餐時吃了三片。

deliver.example_en: The postman comes every morning to deliver letters and packages to our house.
deliver.example_zh: 郵差每天早上來把信件和包裹遞送到我們家。

dentist.example_en: I went to see the dentist because I had a terrible toothache yesterday.
dentist.example_zh: 因為昨天牙齒疼痛得厲害，我去看了牙醫。

deny.example_en: She tried to deny that she had eaten all the cookies in the jar.
deny.example_zh: 她試圖否認她吃掉了罐子裡所有的餅乾。

department.definition: （組織或機構中的）部，系，處，科，室
department.example_en: My father works in the sales department of a big clothing company downtown.
department.example_zh: 我父親在市中心一家大型服裝公司的銷售部門工作。

depend.example_en: Whether we go to the beach depends on whether the weather is sunny.
depend.example_zh: 我們是否去海灘取決於天氣是否晴朗。

describe.example_en: The teacher asked us to describe a memorable moment from our summer holidays.
describe.example_zh: 老師要求我們描述假期中一個難忘的時刻。

desert.example_en: The Sahara is the largest desert in the world, covered with sand for miles.
desert.example_zh: 撒哈拉是世界上最大的沙漠，綿延數英里都是沙漠。

design.example_en: She designed a beautiful dress for her friend's birthday party next month.
design.example_zh: 她為朋友下個月的生日派對設計了一件漂亮的連衣裙。

desire.example_en: Her desire to travel the world started when she was watching travel videos online.
desire.example_zh: 她環遊世界的渴望始於她在網上觀看旅遊視頻的時候。

desk.definition: （常指帶抽屜的）書桌，辦公桌，寫字枱
desk.example_en: I organize my homework and books neatly on my desk every evening after school.
desk.example_zh: 我每天放學後都把功課和書籍整齐地擺放在我的書桌上。

dessert.example_en: For dessert after dinner, mom served chocolate cake with ice cream on top.
dessert.example_zh: 晚餐後的甜點，媽媽端上了頂部加冰淇淋的巧克力蛋糕。

detect.definition: （尤指用特殊方法）發現，察覺，看出
detect.example_en: The security system detected an intruder in the building at three o'clock this morning.
detect.example_zh: 安全系統在今天凌晨三點偵測到建築物內有入侵者。

develop.example_en: As children grow, they develop new skills like reading, writing, and solving math problems.
develop.example_zh: 隨著孩子成長，他們發展出閱讀、寫作和解決數學問題等新技能。

dial.example_en: When the phone rings, I dial the number to call my grandmother back immediately.
dial.example_zh: 電話響時，我立即撥號回電給我的祖母。

diamond.example_en: The diamond ring on her finger was very expensive and shined brightly in light.
diamond.example_zh: 她手指上的鑽石戒指非常昂貴，在光線下閃閃發光。

diary.example_en: Every night she writes in her diary about what happened during the day.
diary.example_zh: 每天晚上她都在日記裡寫下當天發生的事情。

dictionary.example_en: When I encounter a new word, I look it up in my English dictionary.
dictionary.example_zh: 當我遇到陌生單字時，我在英文字典裡查找它。

die.example_en: The flowers began to die when nobody watered them during the summer.
die.example_zh: 整個夏天沒有人澆水，花園裡的花開始枯死。

diet.example_en: My family tries to eat a balanced diet with lots of vegetables every day.
diet.example_zh: 我的家人每天都努力吃均衡的飲食，攝取大量蔬菜。

difference.example_en: The difference between these two phones is that one is cheaper.
difference.example_zh: 這兩支手機的差別在於其中一支更便宜。

different.definition: 不同的，不一樣的，有差別的
different.example_en: My sister likes rock music but I prefer something different.
different.example_zh: 我姐姐喜歡搖滾樂，但我喜歡不同的音樂風格。

difficult.example_en: This math problem is quite difficult, so I need to think carefully.
difficult.example_zh: 這道數學題相當困難，所以我需要仔細思考。

difficulty.example_en: She faced difficulty learning English at first but improved with practice.
difficulty.example_zh: 她起初在學英文時遇到困難，但後來透過練習而進步。

dig.example_en: The dog started to dig in the garden looking for buried bones.
dig.example_zh: 狗開始在花園裡挖土，尋找埋藏的骨頭。

diligent.definition: 認真刻苦的，勤奮的，勤勞的
diligent.example_en: Tom is a diligent student who always finishes his homework on time.
diligent.example_zh: 湯姆是個勤奮的學生，總是按時完成功課。

dinner.definition: 正餐（通常指晚餐，在英國有時指午餐）
dinner.example_en: We usually have dinner together as a family around six o'clock.
dinner.example_zh: 我們通常在六點左右全家一起吃晚餐。

dinosaur.example_en: My little brother has a poster of a huge dinosaur in his bedroom.
dinosaur.example_zh: 我弟弟的房間裡貼著一張巨大恐龍的海報。

diplomat.example_en: The diplomat traveled to different countries to negotiate peace agreements.
diplomat.example_zh: 這位外交官前往不同國家協商和平協議。

direct.example_en: There's a direct flight from Taipei to Tokyo on Tuesday morning.
direct.example_zh: 星期二上午有一班從台北直飛東京的班機。

direction.example_en: Turn left at the traffic light and go in that direction for two blocks.
direction.example_zh: 在紅綠燈處向左轉，沿著那個方向走兩個街區。

dirty.example_en: His clothes were dirty after playing in the mud for hours.
dirty.example_zh: 在泥濘裡玩了幾小時後，他的衣服變得很髒。

disagree.example_en: I disagree with the new school policy about uniform requirements.
disagree.example_zh: 我不同意學校關於制服要求的新政策。

disappear.example_en: The magician made the coin disappear right before the audience's eyes.
disappear.example_zh: 魔術師在觀眾眼前讓硬幣消失了。

discover.example_en: Scientists discovered a new species of fish in the ocean last year.
discover.example_zh: 去年科學家在海洋中發現了一種新魚類。

discuss.example_en: The students will discuss the project in class tomorrow afternoon.
discuss.example_zh: 學生們明天下午會在課堂上討論這個專案。

discussion.example_en: Our team had a long discussion about the best way forward.
discussion.example_zh: 我們團隊對最好的前進方向進行了長時間的討論。

dish.example_en: Please put the dirty dish in the sink after you finish eating.
dish.example_zh: 吃完飯後請把髒盤子放進水槽裡。

dishonest.definition: 不誠實的，不老實的，不正直的
dishonest.example_en: It was dishonest of him to lie about his test scores to his parents.
dishonest.example_zh: 他對父母謊報考試成績是不誠實的行為。

distance.example_en: The distance from Taipei to Kaohsiung is about four hundred kilometers.
distance.example_zh: 從台北到高雄的距離約為四百公里。

distant.example_en: She could see a distant mountain covered with snow on the horizon.
distant.example_zh: 她可以看到遠方被雪覆蓋的山峰在地平線上。

divide.example_en: The teacher will divide the class into four groups for the project.
divide.example_zh: 老師會把班級分成四組做這個專案。

dizzy.definition: 眩暈的，頭暈目眩的，眼花繚亂的
dizzy.example_en: After spinning around many times, Tom felt dizzy and nearly fell down.
dizzy.example_zh: 轉了很多圈之後，湯姆感到頭暈，差點摔倒。

doctor.example_en: My mother went to see the doctor because she had a bad cough.
doctor.example_zh: 我媽媽因為咳嗽嚴重去看醫生。

dog.definition: （尤指當作寵物或用來打獵、看護的）狗，犬
dog.example_en: My neighbor's dog barks loudly every time someone walks past the house.
dog.example_zh: 每次有人走過房子時，我鄰居的狗就會大聲吠叫。

doll.example_en: The little girl loved to play with her favorite doll every afternoon.
doll.example_zh: 小女孩每個下午都喜歡玩她最喜歡的娃娃。

dollar.definition: （美國、加拿大、澳大利亞、紐西蘭等國的貨幣單位）元
dollar.example_en: This book costs fifteen dollars at the bookstore near my school.
dollar.example_zh: 這本書在我學校附近的書店要十五元美金。

dolphin.example_en: We saw several dolphins swimming and jumping in the ocean last summer.
dolphin.example_zh: 去年夏天我們看到幾隻海豚在海裡游泳和跳躍。

donkey.example_en: The farmer used a donkey to carry heavy bags of crops from the field.
donkey.example_zh: 農民用驢子從田裡運載沉重的農作物袋子。

door.example_en: Please close the door quietly so you don't disturb the baby sleeping.
door.example_zh: 請輕輕地關上門，不要驚擾睡著的嬰兒。

dot.example_en: The artist carefully drew small dots on the canvas to create a picture.
dot.example_zh: 藝術家仔細地在畫布上畫了小圓點來創作圖片。

double.example_en: If you double your study time, your grades will improve significantly.
double.example_zh: 如果你把讀書時間加倍，你的成績會明顯進步。

doubt.definition: （尤指對好壞、真實性的）懷疑，疑慮，疑問
doubt.example_en: I doubt that the movie will be better than the book I read.
doubt.example_zh: 我懷疑這部電影不會比我讀過的書更好。

doughnut.definition: 炸麵包圈;炸果醬麵包;甜甜圈
doughnut.example_en: My brother bought a box of strawberry doughnuts at the bakery this morning.
doughnut.example_zh: 我哥哥今早在烘焙店買了一盒草莓甜甜圈。

dove.example_en: The white dove flew gracefully across the sky during the wedding ceremony.
dove.example_zh: 白鴿在婚禮上優雅地飛過天空。

down.example_en: Please look down carefully to avoid stepping on the small stones on the path.
down.example_zh: 請小心向下看，以免踩到路上的小石子。

downstairs.definition: 朝樓下，在樓下（尤指底層）
downstairs.example_en: My parents are having coffee downstairs while watching the evening news together.
downstairs.example_zh: 我的父母在樓下一邊喝咖啡一邊看晚間新聞。

downtown.definition: 在市中心（的）;朝市中心（的）
downtown.example_en: We went downtown last weekend to visit the art museum and shopping mall.
downtown.example_zh: 上個週末我們去市中心參觀藝術博物館和購物中心。

dozen.example_en: The baker made dozens of cookies for the school bake sale yesterday.
dozen.example_zh: 烘焙師昨天為學校烘焙義賣做了好幾打餅乾。

drag.example_en: Please don't drag your feet across the floor when you walk.
drag.example_zh: 走路時請不要拖著腳在地板上。

dragon.example_en: In the fantasy game, you must defeat the dragon to save the kingdom.
dragon.example_zh: 在這個奇幻遊戲中，你必須打敗龍才能拯救王國。

drama.example_en: The school drama club performed Shakespeare's play last week.
drama.example_zh: 學校戲劇社上星期演出了莎士比亞的戲劇。

draw.example_en: My sister loves to draw pictures of animals in her sketchbook.
draw.example_zh: 我妹妹喜歡在速寫本裡畫動物的圖片。

drawer.example_en: I keep my socks and underwear in the top drawer of my dresser.
drawer.example_zh: 我把襪子和內衣放在衣櫃的最上層抽屜裡。

dream.example_en: Last night I had a strange dream about flying over the ocean.
dream.example_zh: 昨晚我做了一個奇怪的夢，夢見自己在海洋上空飛行。

dress.example_en: She wore a beautiful blue dress to the wedding ceremony.
dress.example_zh: 她穿著一件漂亮的藍色洋裝參加婚禮。

drink.example_en: After playing soccer, the kids wanted to drink some cold water.
drink.example_zh: 踢完足球後，孩子們想喝一些冷水。

drive.example_en: My father drives his car to the office every weekday morning.
drive.example_zh: 我父親每個工作日早上都開車去辦公室。

driver.example_en: The bus driver helps elderly passengers climb the steps safely.
driver.example_zh: 公車司機幫助年長乘客安全地上車。

drop.example_en: I accidentally dropped my phone on the kitchen floor yesterday.
drop.example_zh: 我昨天不小心把手機掉在廚房地板上。

drug.example_en: The doctor prescribed a new drug to help treat her illness.
drug.example_zh: 醫生開了一種新藥來幫助治療她的病。

drum.example_en: The washing machine's drum stopped spinning after the wash cycle.
drum.example_zh: 洗衣機的滾筒在洗衣週期後停止旋轉。

dry.example_en: The ground was very dry because there was no rain for months.
dry.example_zh: 因為幾個月沒下雨，地面非常乾燥。

dryer.example_en: I put the wet clothes into the dryer to dry them quickly.
dryer.example_zh: 我把濕衣服放進烘乾機裡快速烘乾。

duck.example_en: The ducks swam happily in the pond near our apartment building.
duck.example_zh: 鴨子在我們公寓樓附近的池塘裡開心地游泳。

dumb.example_en: The dog could not bark, so it remained dumb throughout its life.
dumb.example_zh: 那隻狗無法吠叫，所以它一生都是啞的。

dumpling.example_en: My grandmother makes delicious dumplings with pork and vegetable filling.
dumpling.example_zh: 我奶奶做的豬肉蔬菜餃子非常好吃。

during.example_en: Many students sleep during the afternoon classes because they are tired.
during.example_zh: 許多學生在下午課程中睡著了，因為他們很累。

duty.example_en: It is the teacher's duty to help students learn and understand the material.
duty.example_zh: 幫助學生學習和理解教材是教師的責任。

each.definition: （兩個或兩個以上物或人中的）每個，各，各自
each.example_en: Each student received a certificate after completing the course.
each.example_zh: 每位學生完成課程後都領到了一張證書。

eagle.example_en: The eagle flew high above the mountains searching for food.
eagle.example_zh: 老鷹在山脈上空高飛尋找食物。

ear.example_en: She whispered something in his ear during the meeting.
ear.example_zh: 會議中，她在他耳邊低聲說了什麼。

early.definition: 早期的，初期的;在早期，在初期;提早（的），提前（的）
early.example_en: The early morning sun shone through the bedroom window.
early.example_zh: 清晨的陽光透過臥室窗戶照進來。

earn.example_en: She earns money by tutoring students after school.
earn.example_zh: 她透過課後補習學生來賺錢。

earring.example_en: She lost one earring while playing tennis yesterday.
earring.example_zh: 她昨天在打網球時掉了一隻耳環。

earth.example_en: The earth revolves around the sun once every year.
earth.example_zh: 地球每年繞太陽公轉一次。

ease.example_en: Taking a warm bath helped ease his back pain.
ease.example_zh: 洗溫水澡幫助緩解了他的背痛。

east.example_en: The sun rises in the east and sets in the west.
east.example_zh: 太陽從東方升起，在西方落下。

eastern.definition: （某個地區的）東部的;來自東部的
eastern.example_en: The eastern coast of Taiwan has many beautiful beaches.
eastern.example_zh: 台灣的東部海岸有許多美麗的沙灘。

easy.example_en: This math problem is easy once you understand the concept.
easy.example_zh: 一旦你理解了這個概念，這道數學題就很容易。

eat.example_en: We usually eat dinner together as a family.
eat.example_zh: 我們通常一家人一起吃晚餐。

edge.example_en: Be careful not to step on the edge of the cliff.
edge.example_zh: 小心不要踩到懸崖的邊緣。

education.definition: 教育;受教育獲得的知識
education.example_en: A good education opens many doors in your future career.
education.example_zh: 良好的教育為你的未來職業打開許多大門。

effect.example_en: The medicine had a positive effect on his health.
effect.example_zh: 這種藥物對他的健康產生了積極的效果。

effort.example_en: Their effort to clean the park before the event was impressive.
effort.example_zh: 他們在活動前清潔公園的努力令人印象深刻。

egg.example_en: She cooks two eggs for breakfast every morning.
egg.example_zh: 她每天早上早餐都煮兩個蛋。

eight.example_en: The store is open from eight in the morning until nine at night.
eight.example_zh: 這家店從早上八點開到晚上九點。

eighteen.example_en: She turned eighteen yesterday and can now vote.
eighteen.example_zh: 她昨天滿十八歲，現在可以投票了。

eighty.example_en: My grandfather is eighty years old and still enjoys gardening.
eighty.example_zh: 我祖父已經八十歲了，但仍然喜歡園藝。

elder.definition: （尤指在社會上地位高、受人尊敬的）長者，長輩，老年人
elder.example_en: The elder members of the family shared stories about their childhood with the grandchildren.
elder.example_zh: 家族中年長的成員和孫子孫女分享他們童年的故事。

elect.example_en: Last week, the students voted to elect a new president for the school council.
elect.example_zh: 上週，學生投票選舉了學生會的新會長。

electric.example_en: The electric toaster in the kitchen stopped working this morning.
electric.example_zh: 廚房裡的電動烤麵包機今早壞了。

elephant.example_en: We saw a huge elephant at the zoo eating leaves from the tallest trees.
elephant.example_zh: 我們在動物園看到一隻巨大的象在吃最高樹木上的葉子。

eleven.example_en: There are eleven players on each team in a standard football match.
eleven.example_zh: 足球比賽中，每隊通常有十一名球員。

else.definition: （用於以 any-，every-，no- 和 some- 開頭的詞後面，或用於 how，what，where，who，why 之後，但不用於 which 之後）其他，另外，別的
else.example_en: What else do you need for the camping trip besides a tent and sleeping bag?
else.example_zh: 除了帳篷和睡袋，你還需要什麼其他的野營裝備嗎？

embarrass.example_en: He didn't want to embarrass his friend by telling everyone about the mistake.
embarrass.example_zh: 他不想通過告訴大家他朋友的錯誤來讓他窘迫。

emotion.example_en: The sad movie brought strong emotions to everyone watching it in the theater.
emotion.example_zh: 這部悲傷的電影給戲院裡的每個人都帶來了強烈的情感。

emphasize.example_en: The teacher continued to emphasize the importance of studying grammar rules.
emphasize.example_zh: 老師不斷強調學習語法規則的重要性。

employ.example_en: The new factory will employ over two hundred workers from the local community.
employ.example_zh: 這家新工廠將僱用來自當地社區的兩百多名工人。

empty.example_en: The classroom was empty after the students left for the lunch break.
empty.example_zh: 學生去午餐休息後，教室是空的。

end.example_en: The movie ended with a surprising twist that shocked the entire audience.
end.example_zh: 這部電影以令人驚訝的轉折結尾，讓全場觀眾都感到震驚。

enemy.example_en: In the story, the hero finally defeats his greatest enemy after a long battle.
enemy.example_zh: 在故事中，英雄經過一場長戰後最終擊敗了他的最大敵人。

energetic.definition: 精力充沛的;充滿活力的
energetic.example_en: The energetic coach inspired all the athletes with his positive attitude and enthusiasm.
energetic.example_zh: 精力充沛的教練用他的積極態度和熱情激勵了所有運動員。

energy.example_en: After drinking some water, the tired hiker had enough energy to climb the last hill.
energy.example_zh: 喝了一些水後，疲憊的登山者有足夠的精力爬上最後一座山。

engine.example_en: The car's engine started making a strange noise on the way to work.
engine.example_zh: 汽車的引擎在去上班的路上開始發出奇怪的聲音。

engineer.definition: 工程師;工程（或機械）設計人員
engineer.example_en: The bridge was designed by a talented engineer from a famous construction company.
engineer.example_zh: 這座橋是由一家著名建築公司的才華橫溢的工程師設計的。

enjoy.example_en: The children enjoyed playing in the park after school every day.
enjoy.example_zh: 孩子們每天放學後都喜歡在公園裡玩耍。

enough.example_en: The teacher said we had enough time to finish the test before the bell rang.
enough.example_zh: 老師說在鈴聲響起之前我們有足夠的時間完成測試。

enter.example_en: The students had to enter the examination room quietly without disturbing others.
enter.example_zh: 學生們必須安靜地進入考試室，不要打擾別人。

entrance.example_en: The entrance to the museum was decorated with beautiful flowers and sculptures.
entrance.example_zh: 博物館的入口用美麗的花朵和雕塑裝飾著。

envelope.example_en: She put the birthday card inside a white envelope and sealed it carefully.
envelope.example_zh: 她把生日賀卡放進白色信封裡，並仔細密封。

environment.example_en: We need to protect the environment for future generations to enjoy.
environment.example_zh: 我們需要保護環境，讓未來世代也能享受。

envy.example_en: She envies her friend's ability to speak English so fluently and naturally.
envy.example_zh: 她羨慕朋友能說得這麼流利自然的英文。

equal.example_en: Each student should receive equal attention and support from their teachers.
equal.example_zh: 每位學生應該得到老師平等的關注和幫助。

eraser.example_en: I need an eraser because I made a mistake on my math homework.
eraser.example_zh: 我需要橡皮擦，因為我的數學作業寫錯了。

error.example_en: The software detected an error in the code during the automatic check.
error.example_zh: 在自動檢查過程中，軟體發現了代碼中的錯誤。

especially.example_en: I love all fruits, but I especially enjoy eating mangoes in summer.
especially.example_zh: 我喜歡所有水果，但我尤其喜歡夏天吃芒果。

eve.example_en: On New Year's Eve, families gather together to celebrate and eat special food.
eve.example_zh: 在除夕夜，家人聚在一起慶祝並吃特別的食物。

even.definition: （用來表示令人驚訝、不同尋常、出乎意料或極端的事物）甚至，連，即使
even.example_en: She was so tired that she even fell asleep during the movie.
even.example_zh: 她很疲倦，甚至在看電影時睡著了。

evening.example_en: In the evening, my family sits together in the living room to chat.
evening.example_zh: 每天傍晚，我的家人都聚在客廳一起聊天。

event.definition: （尤指重大或不尋常的）事情，事件
event.example_en: The school organized a sports event where students could compete and have fun.
event.example_zh: 學校組織了一個運動會，讓學生可以參加競賽並玩得開心。

ever.example_en: Have you ever tried eating sushi before visiting a Japanese restaurant?
ever.example_zh: 你去日本餐廳前，曾經試過吃壽司嗎？

every.definition: （三個或三個以上的人或事物組成的群體中的）每一個，每個；全部，整體
every.example_en: Every student in the class received a certificate after the graduation ceremony.
every.example_zh: 班級裡的每位學生在畢業典禮後都獲得了一張證書。

evil.definition: 道德敗壞的;邪惡的，惡毒的;討厭的
evil.example_en: The villain in the movie had evil intentions and wanted to harm everyone.
evil.example_zh: 電影中的反派有邪惡的企圖，想傷害所有人。

exact.example_en: The teacher asked the students to give exact answers without any approximations.
exact.example_zh: 老師要求學生給出確切的答案，不能只是近似值。

exam.example_en: The final exam will cover all the topics we learned throughout the semester.
exam.example_zh: 期末考試將涵蓋我們整個學期學習的所有主題。

example.example_en: The teacher gave an example of proper essay structure for the assignment.
example.example_zh: 老師為作業舉了一個合適的文章結構範例。

excellent.definition: 卓越的；優秀的；傑出的；極好的
excellent.example_en: The restaurant serves excellent food and provides wonderful service to all customers.
excellent.example_zh: 這家餐廳提供優質的食物和為所有顧客提供很好的服務。

except.example_en: Everyone went to the party except Tom, who had to study for his test.
except.example_zh: 除了湯姆以外，每個人都去參加派對，他必須為考試複習。

excite.definition: 激發（情感）；使激動；使興奮
excite.example_en: The surprising gift really excited her on her birthday afternoon.
excite.example_zh: 那份驚喜禮物讓她在生日下午非常興奮。

excuse.example_en: I hope you can excuse my mistake from yesterday during the presentation.
excuse.example_zh: 我希望你能原諒我昨天報告時犯的錯誤。

exercise.example_en: My doctor recommended I do more exercise to stay healthy.
exercise.example_zh: 我的醫生建議我多做運動來保持健康。

exist.example_en: Many myths about dinosaurs still exist in children's imaginations today.
exist.example_zh: 許多關於恐龍的迷思至今仍存在於孩子們的想像中。

exit.definition: （建築物或大型交通工具的）出口，安全門;（尤指演員）退場
exit.example_en: The emergency exit was clearly marked with a green sign near the stairs.
exit.example_zh: 安全出口用綠色標誌清楚地標示在樓梯附近。

expect.example_en: I expect our team will win the basketball competition next month.
expect.example_zh: 我預料我們隊下個月會贏得籃球比賽。

expensive.definition: 昂貴的；用錢多的；價格高的
expensive.example_en: That new restaurant downtown is nice but too expensive for my budget.
expensive.example_zh: 那家新開的市中心餐廳不錯，但對我的預算來說太昂貴了。

experience.example_en: My camping experience last summer taught me valuable survival skills.
experience.example_zh: 我去年夏天的露營經歷教會了我寶貴的生存技能。

explain.example_en: The teacher took time to explain the difficult math problem patiently.
explain.example_zh: 老師耐心地花時間解釋了這道困難的數學題。

express.example_en: She expressed her gratitude by helping him with his homework.
express.example_zh: 她透過幫他做功課來表達她的感謝之心。

extra.example_en: They served extra pizza at the party because many friends came.
extra.example_zh: 由於朋友很多，派對上他們準備了額外的披薩。

eye.example_en: She closed her eyes and made a wish before blowing out candles.
eye.example_zh: 她閉上眼睛，在吹蠟燭前許了個願望。

eyebrow.example_en: His raised eyebrow showed he was surprised by the unexpected news.
eyebrow.example_zh: 他揚起的眉毛表明他對這個意外的消息感到驚訝。

face.example_en: Her happy face immediately brightened the dark and gloomy classroom.
face.example_zh: 她開心的表情立即照亮了陰暗沉悶的教室。

fact.definition: 現實，實際情況；（尤指）事實，真相
fact.example_en: The fact that she won the science competition proved her hard work.
fact.example_zh: 她贏得科學競賽的事實證明了她的努力。

factory.example_en: The new car factory just opened in our city and hired many workers.
factory.example_zh: 新開設的汽車工廠在我們城市創造了許多工作機會。

fail.example_en: He failed his driving test twice before finally passing on the third try.
fail.example_zh: 他駕照考試失敗了兩次，最後第三次才通過。

fair.definition: 合理的；公平的；公正的；平等待人的
fair.example_en: The referee made a fair decision even though it favored the other team.
fair.example_zh: 裁判做了公平的判決，即使對方隊有利。

fall.example_en: The little boy fell off his bicycle and scraped both of his knees.
fall.example_zh: 小男孩從自行車上摔下來，兩個膝蓋都擦傷了。

false.example_en: She wore false eyelashes to look more glamorous at the school dance.
false.example_zh: 她在學校舞會上戴了假睫毛來看起來更迷人。

family.example_en: My family likes to eat breakfast together every Sunday morning.
family.example_zh: 我的家人喜歡每個星期天早上一起吃早餐。

famous.example_en: That restaurant is famous for its delicious noodles and friendly service.
famous.example_zh: 那家餐廳因為美味的麵條和親切的服務而很有名。

fan.example_en: She is a huge fan of that K-pop group and attends their concerts.
fan.example_zh: 她是那個韓國流行樂團的忠實粉絲，經常參加他們的演唱會。

fancy.example_en: Do you fancy trying that new ice cream shop near the mall?
fancy.example_zh: 你想不想試試商場附近那家新的冰淇淋店？

fantastic.example_en: The show was fantastic, and everyone loved the special effects.
fantastic.example_zh: 那場表演極棒，大家都很喜歡特殊效果。

far.example_en: The mountains are far from the city, but worth the long journey.
far.example_zh: 那些山脈離城市很遠，但值得長途跋涉去看。

farm.example_en: His grandfather owns a small farm where he grows vegetables and raises chickens.
farm.example_zh: 他的祖父擁有一個小農場，在那裡種菜和養雞。

farmer.example_en: The farmer works early in the morning to water the crops before it gets hot.
farmer.example_zh: 農民一大早就起來在天熱之前澆灌莊稼。

fashion.definition: （尤指服裝、髮型、妝容的）流行款式，時興式樣
fashion.example_en: She loves fashion and always wears the latest clothing styles from magazines.
fashion.example_zh: 她喜歡時尚，總是穿著雜誌上最新的服裝款式。

fast.example_en: He runs so fast that he always finishes the race before his friends.
fast.example_zh: 他跑得很快，經常比朋友們先完成比賽。

fat.example_en: The cat is fat because it eats too many treats every single day.
fat.example_zh: 那隻貓很胖，因為它每天吃太多零食。

father.example_en: His father taught him how to cook dinner when he was ten years old.
father.example_zh: 他的父親在他十歲時教他怎麼煮晚餐。

faucet.example_en: The bathroom faucet was dripping all night, so Dad fixed it this morning.
faucet.example_zh: 浴室的水龍頭整晚都在滴水，所以爸爸今早把它修好了。

fault.example_en: It was my fault that we arrived late, so I apologized to everyone.
fault.example_zh: 我們遲到是我的錯，所以我向大家道了歉。

favorite.example_en: My favorite subject in school is English because I enjoy reading stories.
favorite.example_zh: 我在學校最喜歡的科目是英文，因為我喜歡讀故事。

fear.example_en: She has a fear of spiders and screams whenever she sees one in her room.
fear.example_zh: 她害怕蜘蛛，每次在房間看到蜘蛛都會尖叫。

february.example_en: February is the shortest month, so summer vacation feels very far away.
february.example_zh: 二月是最短的月份，所以暑假看起來還很遠。

fee.example_en: The swimming pool charges an entrance fee, but members get discounts every month.
fee.example_zh: 游泳池收取入場費，但會員每月都有折扣。

feed.definition: 給（人、團體或動物）提供食物;餵養
feed.example_en: She feeds her rabbits fresh vegetables and hay every morning before school.
feed.example_zh: 她每天上學前都給她的兔子餵新鮮蔬菜和乾草。

feel.example_en: When I listen to my favorite music, I feel happy and want to dance.
feel.example_zh: 當我聽最喜歡的音樂時，我感到很高興，想跳舞。

feeling.example_en: I get a strange feeling when I sit alone in the dark room.
feeling.example_zh: 當我獨自坐在黑暗房間裡時，會有奇怪的感覺。

female.definition: 女性的；婦女的；雌的；母的
female.example_en: The female students in my class enjoy playing volleyball together.
female.example_zh: 我班上的女同學喜歡一起打排球。
