picture.example_en: Can you draw a picture of your favorite animal on this paper?
picture.example_zh: 你能在這張紙上畫出你最喜歡的動物嗎？

pie.example_en: Mom baked an apple pie for dessert after our dinner yesterday.
pie.example_zh: 媽媽昨天晚餐後烤了一個蘋果派當甜點。

piece.example_en: She broke the chocolate bar into small pieces and shared with friends.
piece.example_zh: 她把巧克力棒分成小塊，和朋友們分享。

pig.definition: 令人討厭的人，難相處的人
pig.example_en: He never shares anything with us, so we think he is a real pig.
pig.example_zh: 他從不和我們分享任何東西，所以我們認為他是個難相處的人。

pigeon.example_en: The pigeon landed on the windowsill and ate the breadcrumbs I left.
pigeon.example_zh: 鴿子停在窗台上，吃掉我留下的麵包屑。

pile.example_en: There was a huge pile of dirty clothes on my bedroom floor.
pile.example_zh: 我房間的地板上有一大堆髒衣服。

pillow.example_en: I rest my head on my soft pillow every night before I sleep.
pillow.example_zh: 我每晚睡覺前都把頭放在柔軟的枕頭上。

pin.definition: （尤指用於固定布料用的）別針，大頭針
pin.example_en: She used a pin to attach the poster to the wall safely.
pin.example_zh: 她用別針把海報牢固地固定在牆上。

pineapple.example_en: The juice from the pineapple was sweet and refreshing on hot days.
pineapple.example_zh: 鳳梨果汁在炎熱的日子裡既香甜又清爽。

pink.example_en: Sarah wore a pink dress to the school dance last weekend.
pink.example_zh: 莎拉上週末穿著粉紅色洋裝去參加學校舞會。

pipe.example_en: The water comes from the underground pipe that runs beneath our street.
pipe.example_zh: 水來自於在我們街道下方的地下管道。

pizza.example_en: We ordered a large pizza with cheese and pepperoni for our party.
pizza.example_zh: 我們為派對訂購了一個起司和辣椒披薩。

place.example_en: The library is a quiet place where students go to study.
place.example_zh: 圖書館是學生去學習的安靜場所。

plain.definition: 樸素的；不加修飾的；簡單的
plain.example_en: She prefers plain clothes without any fancy patterns or bright colors.
plain.example_zh: 她喜歡沒有花紋或亮色的樸素衣服。

plan.example_en: We made a plan to visit the museum next Saturday morning.
plan.example_zh: 我們計劃下週六早上去參觀博物館。

planet.example_en: Earth is the planet where we live and we must protect it.
planet.example_zh: 地球是我們生活的星球，我們必須保護它。

plant.example_en: I water the plant on my desk every morning to keep it healthy.
plant.example_zh: 我每天早上給我桌上的植物澆水，讓它保持健康。

plate.example_en: Mom put the hot food on a ceramic plate for dinner.
plate.example_zh: 媽媽把熱菜放在陶瓷盤子裡當晚餐。

platform.example_en: The train arrived at the platform and all passengers got on board.
platform.example_zh: 火車到達月台，所有乘客都上了車。

play.example_en: The children play together in the park every afternoon after school.
play.example_zh: 孩子們每天放學後在公園裡一起玩耍。

player.example_en: The football player scored three goals in the match yesterday.
player.example_zh: 那位足球運動員在昨天的比賽中進了三球。

playground.example_en: My little brother loves to run around the playground during recess time.
playground.example_zh: 我弟弟喜歡在下課時間在操場上跑來跑去。

pleasant.definition: 令人愉快的;宜人的;親切友好的
pleasant.example_en: The weather was pleasant so we decided to have lunch outside.
pleasant.example_zh: 天氣宜人，所以我們決定在外面吃午餐。

please.definition: 好嗎，請（用於客氣地請求）
please.example_en: Could you please pass me the salt from that table over there?
please.example_zh: 你能幫我遞一下那邊桌上的鹽嗎？

plus.example_en: Five plus three equals eight in mathematics class today.
plus.example_zh: 五加三等於八，這是今天數學課的內容。

pocket.example_en: I found ten dollars in the pocket of my old jacket yesterday.
pocket.example_zh: 我昨天在舊夾克的口袋裡發現了十塊錢。

poem.example_en: She wrote a beautiful poem about the mountains for her homework.
poem.example_zh: 她為了功課寫了一首關於山的美麗詩歌。

poet.example_en: The famous poet gave a reading of her new work at the library.
poet.example_zh: 那位著名詩人在圖書館朗誦了她的新作品。

point.example_en: Tom pointed at the building and asked his friend what it was.
point.example_zh: 湯姆指著那棟建築物，問他的朋友那是什麼。

poison.example_en: The scientist warned us that some mushrooms contain poison and are dangerous.
poison.example_zh: 科學家警告我們某些蘑菇含有毒素，很危險。

police.example_en: The police arrived quickly and helped the lost child find her mother.
police.example_zh: 警方很快趕到，幫助那個迷路的小女孩找到了媽媽。

polite.example_en: It is polite to say thank you when someone gives you a gift.
polite.example_zh: 當有人送你禮物時，說謝謝是有禮貌的舉動。

pollute.example_en: Too many cars pollute the air in big cities every single day.
pollute.example_zh: 太多汽車每天污染大城市的空氣。

pollution.example_en: Air pollution is a serious problem that affects everyone's health today.
pollution.example_zh: 空氣污染是一個嚴重的問題，影響著每個人的健康。

pond.example_en: The ducks swim and play in the small pond behind our school.
pond.example_zh: 鴨子們在我們學校後面的小池塘裡遊泳和玩耍。

pool.example_en: We went swimming at the public pool on a hot summer afternoon.
pool.example_zh: 在炎熱的夏日午後，我們在公共游泳池游泳。

poor.example_en: The poor family received help from the community to buy new clothes.
poor.example_zh: 那個貧困的家庭從社區獲得幫助購買新衣服。

popcorn.example_en: We shared a big bucket of popcorn while watching the movie together.
popcorn.example_zh: 我們看電影時一起分享了一大桶爆玉米花。

popular.definition: 受大眾喜愛的，受歡迎的
popular.example_en: That singer is very popular among teenagers and has many young fans.
popular.example_zh: 那位歌手在青少年中非常受歡迎，有許多年輕粉絲。

population.example_en: The population of Taiwan has been stable over the last decade.
population.example_zh: 台灣的人口在過去十年裡保持穩定。

pork.example_en: My mother cooked delicious pork for dinner last night.
pork.example_zh: 我媽媽昨晚煮了美味的豬肉當晚餐。

port.example_en: The fishing boats returned to the port early in the morning.
port.example_zh: 漁船一大早就返回港口。

pose.definition: 造成，引起（尤指問題或困難）
pose.example_en: Climate change poses serious challenges to agriculture worldwide.
pose.example_zh: 氣候變化對全球農業造成了嚴峻的挑戰。

position.example_en: The teacher asked us to mark the position of each city on the map.
position.example_zh: 老師要求我們在地圖上標記每座城市的位置。

positive.definition: 建設性的;積極的;懷有希望的
positive.example_en: Despite the failure, she remained positive and tried again.
positive.example_zh: 儘管失敗了，她仍然保持積極態度並再次嘗試。

possible.example_en: It is possible to learn a new language if you study consistently.
possible.example_zh: 如果你持續學習，就有可能學會一種新語言。

post.example_en: I sent the letter by post to my friend in London.
post.example_zh: 我通過郵件把信寄給了倫敦的朋友。

pot.example_en: She boiled water in the pot and made tea for everyone.
pot.example_zh: 她在壺裡燒水，為大家泡茶。

potato.example_en: She peeled the potato and cut it into small pieces.
potato.example_zh: 她削去馬鈴薯的皮，把它切成小塊。

pound.definition: 鎊（英國等國家的貨幣單位）
pound.example_en: The expensive jacket in the store cost one hundred pounds.
pound.example_zh: 這件昂貴的夾克在店裡要一百英鎊。

powder.example_en: My grandmother added powder to the cake mixture before baking.
powder.example_zh: 我奶奶在烘焙前把粉末加入蛋糕混合物中。

power.example_en: The strongest nations in the world have great power over smaller countries.
power.example_zh: 世界上最強的國家對較小的國家有很大的影響力。

practice.example_en: Regular practice makes you better at playing the piano.
practice.example_zh: 定期練習讓你在彈鋼琴方面變得更好。

praise.example_en: The teacher gave praise to the students for their excellent work.
praise.example_zh: 老師讚揚了學生們優秀的作業。

pray.example_en: Many people pray before eating meals in their daily life.
pray.example_zh: 許多人在日常生活中吃飯前禱告。

precious.example_en: The old photograph is precious because it shows her family long ago.
precious.example_zh: 這張舊照片很珍貴，因為它顯示了她很久前的家人。

prefer.definition: 寧可，更喜愛;覺得還是…更可取
prefer.example_en: My sister prefers eating fruit to eating candy.
prefer.example_zh: 我妹妹寧可吃水果也不吃糖果。

prepare.definition: 準備，預備;把…準備好，使預備好
prepare.example_en: We must prepare our lessons before the examination begins next month.
prepare.example_zh: 我們必須在下個月考試開始前準備課程。

presence.definition: 出席，在場;（事物的）存在，出現
presence.example_en: Her presence in the classroom made everyone feel more comfortable and happy.
presence.example_zh: 她在教室裡的出席讓每個人都感到更舒適和快樂。

present.definition: （尤指表示友誼或致謝的）禮物，贈品
present.example_en: My grandmother gave me a beautiful present for my birthday.
present.example_zh: 我的祖母在我生日時給了我一份美麗的禮物。

president.example_en: The president of our country gave an important speech.
president.example_zh: 我們國家的總統發表了一次重要的演講。

pressure.example_en: Many students feel pressure when taking important exams.
pressure.example_zh: 許多學生在考重要考試時感到壓力。

pretty.example_en: The new art museum is pretty expensive but very interesting.
pretty.example_zh: 新美術館頗貴，但非常有趣。

price.example_en: The price of vegetables increased after the bad weather.
price.example_zh: 壞天氣後，蔬菜的價格上漲了。

pride.example_en: She felt great pride when she won the competition.
pride.example_zh: 她贏得比賽時感到非常自豪。

priest.definition: 神父，牧師，司鐸;（基督教以外的）神職人員
priest.example_en: The priest blessed the church every Sunday morning.
priest.example_zh: 神父每個星期天上午都祝福教堂。

primary.example_en: Good health is the primary concern for every family.
primary.example_zh: 健康是每個家庭的首要關切。

prince.example_en: The young prince studied hard to become a good leader.
prince.example_zh: 年輕王子努力學習以成為一位好領袖。

princess.example_en: The princess wore a beautiful dress at the royal ball.
princess.example_zh: 公主在皇家舞會上穿著漂亮的洋裝。

principal.example_en: The principal of our school announced new rules for students.
principal.example_zh: 我們學校的校長宣布了學生的新規則。

print.example_en: I need to print my homework before the class starts.
print.example_zh: 我需要在課堂開始前印出我的家庭作業。

prison.example_en: The criminal was sent to prison for five years.
prison.example_zh: 那名罪犯被送進監獄五年。

private.example_en: The royal family lives in a private castle away from the city.
private.example_zh: 皇家家族住在遠離城市的私人城堡。

prize.example_en: The winner of the competition received a money prize.
prize.example_zh: 比賽的獲勝者獲得了獎金。

probably.example_en: It will probably rain tomorrow, so bring an umbrella.
probably.example_zh: 明天很可能會下雨，所以帶把傘。

problem.definition: （須解決的）問題；疑難問題，困難
problem.example_en: We need to solve this difficult problem together before tomorrow.
problem.example_zh: 我們需要在明天之前一起解決這個困難的問題。

produce.example_en: This factory produces cars for customers around the world.
produce.example_zh: 這家工廠為全世界的客戶生產汽車。

production.example_en: The production of our new product will start next month.
production.example_zh: 我們新產品的生產將於下個月開始。

professor.example_en: The professor explained the math lesson very clearly in class.
professor.example_zh: 教授在課堂上非常清楚地解釋了數學課程。

program.example_en: My brother wrote a program that helps organize photos on the computer.
program.example_zh: 我哥哥寫了一個幫助整理電腦照片的程式。

progress.example_en: She showed great progress in English after studying for three months.
progress.example_zh: 她學習三個月後英文進步很大。

project.example_en: Our class is working on a science project about water pollution.
project.example_zh: 我們班正在做一個關於水污染的科學專案。

promise.example_en: He made a promise to call his mother every Sunday morning.
promise.example_zh: 他承諾每個星期天早上打電話給媽媽。

pronounce.example_en: The teacher asked us to pronounce difficult French words correctly.
pronounce.example_zh: 老師要求我們正確地發音法文中的難字。

protect.example_en: Parents work hard to protect their children from danger.
protect.example_zh: 父母努力保護孩子遠離危險。

proud.example_en: My grandfather felt very proud when his grandchild won the award.
proud.example_zh: 當孫子獲獎時，我的祖父感到非常驕傲。

prove.example_en: She studied hard to prove that she could succeed in mathematics.
prove.example_zh: 她努力學習來證明她能在數學上成功。

provide.example_en: The school provides free lunch for students from poor families.
provide.example_zh: 學校為貧困家庭的學生提供免費午餐。

public.example_en: Many people use public transportation to go to work every day.
public.example_zh: 許多人每天使用大眾運輸工具上班。

pull.example_en: The boy pulled his heavy suitcase down the airport hallway.
pull.example_zh: 男孩在機場走廊裡拖著他沉重的行李箱。

pump.definition: 唧筒，幫浦，抽水機;油泵;打氣筒
pump.example_en: We used a pump to fill the bicycle tire with air.
pump.example_zh: 我們用打氣筒給自行車輪胎充氣。

pumpkin.example_en: My grandmother cooked a delicious pumpkin soup for Thanksgiving dinner.
pumpkin.example_zh: 我的祖母在感恩節晚餐做了美味的南瓜湯。

punish.example_en: The teacher decided to punish the students who cheated on the exam.
punish.example_zh: 老師決定懲罰那些考試作弊的學生。

puppy.example_en: The little puppy wagged its tail when it saw its owner.
puppy.example_zh: 小狗看到主人時搖著尾巴。

purple.example_en: She bought a purple backpack to carry her books to school.
purple.example_zh: 她買了一個紫色背包來裝她的書去學校。

purpose.example_en: The main purpose of this exercise is to improve your strength.
purpose.example_zh: 這個運動的主要目的是增強你的力量。

purse.example_en: She opened her purse to find her keys and wallet inside.
purse.example_zh: 她打開錢包想找到她的鑰匙和皮夾。

push.example_en: We all pushed the car together when it broke down on the road.
push.example_zh: 當汽車在路上故障時，我們一起推動它。

put.example_en: She put the books on the shelf before going to bed.
put.example_zh: 她在睡前把書放在架子上。

puzzle.definition: 令人費解的情況;難題;謎
puzzle.example_en: The math puzzle was so difficult that I spent an hour trying to solve it.
puzzle.example_zh: 那道數學謎題非常困難，我花了一個小時才解開它。

quality.example_en: The quality of these apples is really good because they are fresh and sweet.
quality.example_zh: 這些蘋果的品質真的很好，因為它們新鮮又甜。

quantity.definition: （尤指可測量或確定的）量，數量，分量
quantity.example_en: We need a larger quantity of rice to feed all the guests at the party.
quantity.example_zh: 我們需要更大量的米來招待派對上的所有客人。

quarter.example_en: I ate a quarter of the pizza and my sister ate the rest of it.
quarter.example_zh: 我吃了四分之一的披薩，我妹妹吃了剩下的。

queen.example_en: The queen wore a beautiful crown and ruled over her kingdom for many years.
queen.example_zh: 那位女王戴著美麗的王冠，統治她的王國很多年。

question.example_en: The teacher asked a difficult question and no one knew the answer immediately.
question.example_zh: 老師問了一個困難的問題，沒人馬上知道答案。

quick.example_en: A quick shower before school helped me feel fresh and ready for the day.
quick.example_zh: 上學前快速洗個澡幫助我感到清爽，為一天做好準備。

quiet.example_en: The library is very quiet so students can concentrate on their homework there.
quiet.example_zh: 圖書館非常安靜，所以學生可以在那裡專心做功課。

quit.example_en: My friend quit the soccer team because he wanted to focus on his studies.
quit.example_zh: 我朋友退出了足球隊，因為他想專注於他的學業。

quite.example_en: The movie was quite boring so I fell asleep during the second half.
quite.example_zh: 那部電影相當無聊，所以我在下半場睡著了。

quiz.example_en: Our English teacher gave us a surprise quiz on the vocabulary we learned this week.
quiz.example_zh: 我們的英文老師對我們進行了突擊小考，考我們這週學的單字。

rabbit.example_en: My sister keeps a white rabbit as a pet and feeds it fresh vegetables every day.
rabbit.example_zh: 我妹妹養著一隻白色的兔子作為寵物，每天都餵它新鮮蔬菜。

race.example_en: I participated in the school sports day race and finished in second place overall.
race.example_zh: 我參加了校運會的賽跑，總體上排名第二。

radio.example_en: My grandfather listens to the radio every morning while eating his breakfast.
radio.example_zh: 我祖父每天早上吃早餐時都聽收音機。

railroad.example_en: The railroad runs through the mountain and connects three different cities to each other.
railroad.example_zh: 那條鐵路穿過山脈，連接三個不同的城市。

rain.example_en: We had to cancel the outdoor picnic because heavy rain started in the afternoon.
rain.example_zh: 我們必須取消戶外野餐，因為午後開始下起大雨。

rainbow.example_en: A beautiful rainbow appeared in the sky after the storm finally stopped raining.
rainbow.example_zh: 風暴停止下雨後，天空中出現了一道美麗的彩虹。

rainy.example_en: On rainy days like today I prefer to stay inside and read a good book.
rainy.example_zh: 像今天這樣下雨的日子，我寧願待在室內看好書。

raise.example_en: During the meeting the manager asked us to raise our hands if we had questions.
raise.example_zh: 在會議中經理要求我們有問題時舉手。

range.example_en: The supermarket offers a wide range of products from different countries around the world.
range.example_zh: 超市提供來自世界各地的各種產品。

rare.definition: 稀少的；罕見的；不常發生的
rare.example_en: Blue diamonds are extremely rare and very expensive.
rare.example_zh: 藍色鑽石非常稀有，價格也很昂貴。

rat.example_en: A small rat ran quickly across the kitchen floor last night.
rat.example_zh: 一隻小老鼠昨晚迅速地跑過廚房地板。

rather.example_en: The movie was rather long, so I felt a bit tired.
rather.example_zh: 這部電影相當長，所以我感到有點疲倦。

reach.definition: （尤指經過很長時間或費很大氣力旅行後）到達，抵達
reach.example_en: After driving for eight hours, we finally reached the mountain village.
reach.example_zh: 開了八小時車後，我們終於抵達了那個山區村莊。

read.example_en: She read three chapters of the novel before going to bed.
read.example_zh: 她在睡前讀了這部小說的三章。

ready.definition: 準備好的，有準備的；現成的；方便使用的
ready.example_en: The students were ready for the test because they studied all week.
ready.example_zh: 學生們已經準備好了考試，因為他們整週都在讀書。

real.definition: 實際存在的，現實的；真實的
real.example_en: Is that a real diamond or just a piece of glass?
real.example_zh: 那是真正的鑽石還是只是一塊玻璃？

realize.example_en: Suddenly she realized that she had forgotten her passport at home.
realize.example_zh: 她突然意識到她把護照忘在家裡了。

really.example_en: That restaurant was really expensive, but the food tasted amazing.
really.example_zh: 那家餐廳真的很貴，但食物嚐起來很棒。

reason.example_en: The main reason she didn't come to school was that she was sick.
reason.example_zh: 她沒有來學校的主要原因是她生病了。

receive.example_en: Tom received a special birthday gift from his grandmother last month.
receive.example_zh: 湯姆上個月從他祖母那裡收到了一份特別的生日禮物。

record.example_en: He made a video record of his grandfather telling family stories.
record.example_zh: 他錄製了一段他祖父講述家族故事的影片。

recover.definition: （在疾病或受傷之後）完全恢復健康
recover.example_en: After breaking his leg, the athlete needed months to recover completely.
recover.example_zh: 腿骨折後，運動員需要好幾個月才能完全恢復。

rectangle.example_en: The swimming pool is shaped like a long rectangle with rounded corners.
rectangle.example_zh: 游泳池呈現長矩形的形狀，邊角是圓的。

recycle.definition: 分揀收集（垃圾）用於回收再用
recycle.example_en: Please recycle your plastic bottles instead of throwing them in the trash.
recycle.example_zh: 請回收你的塑膠瓶，而不是把它們丟進垃圾桶。

red.example_en: She wore a bright red dress to the school dance last Saturday.
red.example_zh: 她上週六穿著一件亮紅色的連身裙去學校舞蹈。

refrigerator.example_en: The refrigerator broke down, so we lost all the food inside it.
refrigerator.example_zh: 冰箱故障了，所以我們失去了裡面所有的食物。

refuse.example_en: He refused to eat vegetables, so his mother made him stay at the table.
refuse.example_zh: 他拒絕吃蔬菜，所以他母親讓他坐在餐桌前。

regard.example_en: Many people regard chocolate as one of the best treats in the world.
regard.example_zh: 許多人把巧克力視為世界上最好的零食之一。

regret.example_en: She felt regret about the words she had spoken in anger yesterday.
regret.example_zh: 她對昨天在生氣時說的話感到懊悔。

regular.definition: 頻繁的;經常發生的;經常做的
regular.example_en: I go to the gym on a regular basis to stay healthy.
regular.example_zh: 我經常去健身房來保持健康。

reject.definition: 拒絕接受;拒收;不錄用;不相信
reject.example_en: The company rejected his job application after the interview.
reject.example_zh: 面試後，公司拒絕了他的求職申請。

relation.example_en: There is a clear relation between exercise and better health.
relation.example_zh: 運動與更好的健康有明確的關聯。

relative.example_en: My cousin is my favorite relative in the whole family.
relative.example_zh: 我的表哥是我最喜歡的親戚。

remember.definition: 記得，記起，回想起;記住，牢記
remember.example_en: I can never remember all my passwords no matter how hard I try.
remember.example_zh: 無論我多努力，我總是無法記住所有的密碼。

remind.example_en: The photo reminds me of the fun times we had together.
remind.example_zh: 這張照片讓我想起我們一起度過的美好時光。

rent.example_en: My parents rent an apartment in the city center.
rent.example_zh: 我的父母在市中心租了一間公寓。

repair.example_en: The mechanic will repair your bicycle next week.
repair.example_zh: 機械師下週會修理你的自行車。

repeat.example_en: The teacher asked the student to repeat the sentence more slowly.
repeat.example_zh: 老師要求學生更慢地重複那句話。

reply.example_en: She did not reply to my message until the next morning.
reply.example_zh: 她直到第二天早上才回覆我的訊息。

report.example_en: The weather report says it will rain tomorrow afternoon.
report.example_zh: 天氣報告說明天下午會下雨。

reporter.example_en: The reporter asked important questions during the press conference.
reporter.example_zh: 記者在新聞發佈會上提出了重要的問題。

require.example_en: This recipe requires fresh eggs and good quality butter.
require.example_zh: 這個食譜需要新鮮的雞蛋和優質的黃油。

respect.example_en: I have great respect for people who work hard.
respect.example_zh: 我非常尊重那些努力工作的人。

responsible.example_en: She is responsible for training all the new employees.
responsible.example_zh: 她負責訓練所有新員工。

rest.example_en: After the hard game, the athletes needed a good rest.
rest.example_zh: 激烈的比賽後，運動員需要好好休息。

restaurant.example_en: My family loves to eat at that Italian restaurant downtown.
restaurant.example_zh: 我的家人喜歡在城裡那家義大利餐館吃飯。

restroom.definition: （公共場所的）盥洗室，洗手間，公共廁所
restroom.example_en: Where is the restroom in this shopping mall?
restroom.example_zh: 這家購物中心的洗手間在哪裡？

result.example_en: The test results came back yesterday afternoon.
result.example_zh: 考試成績昨天下午就出來了。

return.example_en: What time will you return home from school today?
return.example_zh: 你今天放學後什麼時候回家？

review.example_en: He asked his teacher to review his essay before submitting it.
review.example_zh: 他請老師在提交前審核他的作文。

revise.example_en: The author decided to revise her book and make it clearer for readers.
revise.example_zh: 作者決定修改她的書，讓讀者更容易理解。

rice.example_en: Every morning, my grandmother cooks rice and soup for our breakfast.
rice.example_zh: 每天早上，我奶奶為我們做米飯和湯。

rich.example_en: Her family is rich, but she still works hard at her job.
rich.example_zh: 她的家族很富有，但她仍然努力工作。

ride.example_en: My brother likes to ride his bicycle to school every day.
ride.example_zh: 我哥哥喜歡每天騎自行車去上學。

right.example_en: The teacher said my answer was right, so I got full marks.
right.example_zh: 老師說我的答案是對的，所以我得了滿分。

ring.definition: 環（狀物）;圓形的東西;環形排列
ring.example_en: She wore a gold ring on her wedding day and looked very beautiful.
ring.example_zh: 她在結婚那天戴著金戒指，看起來很漂亮。

rise.example_en: The sun rises early in the morning, and the temperature rises quickly.
rise.example_zh: 太陽在早上升起，溫度迅速上升。

river.example_en: We went fishing near the river and caught several fish for dinner.
river.example_zh: 我們在河邊釣魚，為晚餐釣到了幾條魚。

road.example_en: The main road near our school is very busy in the morning.
road.example_zh: 我們學校附近的主幹道在早上非常繁忙。

rob.example_en: The news reported that thieves tried to rob a convenience store last night.
rob.example_zh: 新聞報導說小偷昨晚試圖搶劫一家便利店。

robot.example_en: The factory uses robots to build cars quickly and without making mistakes.
robot.example_zh: 工廠使用機器人快速組裝汽車，不會出錯。

rock.example_en: When we hiked up the mountain, we had to climb over large rocks.
rock.example_zh: 當我們爬山時，必須爬過許多大岩石。

role.example_en: In the school play, Tom played the role of a brave hero.
role.example_zh: 在學校戲劇中，湯姆扮演一個勇敢的英雄角色。

roll.example_en: The ball rolled down the hill and stopped at the fence below.
roll.example_zh: 球從山坡上滾下來，停在下面的籬笆邊。

roof.example_en: After the heavy rain, water leaked through our roof into the bedroom.
roof.example_zh: 大雨過後，水通過我們的屋頂滲進臥室。

room.example_en: My room is small, but it has enough space for a bed and desk.
room.example_zh: 我的房間很小，但足以放下床和書桌。

root.example_en: Plants need water to absorb nutrients through their roots and grow tall.
root.example_zh: 植物需要水透過根吸收養分並生長。

rope.example_en: In gym class, students had to climb a rope hanging from the ceiling.
rope.example_zh: 在體育課上，學生必須爬著懸掛在天花板上的繩子。

rose.example_en: My mother received a beautiful red rose as a gift on Mother's Day.
rose.example_zh: 我的媽媽在母親節收到了一朵美麗的紅玫瑰作為禮物。

round.example_en: The teacher walked round the classroom to check every student's work.
round.example_zh: 老師走過教室，檢查每個學生的作業。

row.example_en: The students sat in a row waiting for their turn to sing.
row.example_zh: 學生們排成一排，等著輪到他們唱歌。

royal.example_en: The royal family lives in a huge palace with many servants.
royal.example_zh: 王室家族住在一座有很多僕人的大宮殿裡。

rub.example_en: My eyes felt tired, so I rubbed them gently with my fingers.
rub.example_zh: 我的眼睛感到疲倦，所以我用手指輕輕地揉著。

rubber.example_en: I used a rubber to erase the pencil mark from my math homework.
rubber.example_zh: 我用橡皮擦掉了數學作業上的鉛筆痕跡。

rude.definition: 不禮貌的;粗魯的，粗野的;討厭的
rude.example_en: It was rude of him to interrupt while his friend was talking.
rude.example_zh: 他在朋友說話時打斷，這是很不禮貌的。

ruin.example_en: The heavy rain ruined the outdoor concert that everyone was planning.
ruin.example_zh: 大雨毀掉了大家計劃的戶外音樂會。

rule.example_en: The teacher rules that students must finish homework before playing.
rule.example_zh: 老師規定學生必須先完成功課才能玩。

ruler.example_en: The ancient ruler led his soldiers into battle to protect the kingdom.
ruler.example_zh: 這位古老的統治者帶領他的士兵進行戰爭來保護王國。

run.example_en: Every morning he runs five kilometers in the park before breakfast.
run.example_zh: 他每天早上在公園裡跑五公里後才吃早餐。

rush.definition: （使）急速行進;（使）趕緊;（使）倉促行事;（使）急速做
rush.example_en: She rushed to the hospital when she heard her mother was sick.
rush.example_zh: 當她聽說母親生病時，她急忙趕到醫院。

sad.definition: 傷心的，悲哀的;令人難過的，令人遺憾的
sad.example_en: He felt sad after saying goodbye to his best friend forever.
sad.example_zh: 他與最要好的朋友永遠說再見後感到難過。

safe.example_en: Playing in the locked playground made the children feel very safe.
safe.example_zh: 在上鎖的遊樂場玩耍讓孩子們感到非常安全。

safety.example_en: Road safety is important, so always look both ways before crossing.
safety.example_zh: 道路安全很重要，所以在過馬路前一定要左右看。

sail.example_en: The large ship sailed across the ocean for two whole weeks.
sail.example_zh: 這艘大船在海上航行了整整兩周。

sailor.example_en: The old sailor told exciting stories about storms and faraway lands.
sailor.example_zh: 這位老水手講述了關於風暴和遠方土地的刺激故事。

salad.definition: （通常用生菜等做成的）蔬菜沙拉
salad.example_en: For lunch, I made a fresh salad with tomatoes and lettuce.
salad.example_zh: 午餐時，我用番茄和生菜做了一份新鮮沙拉。

sale.example_en: The store had a big sale, so I bought a new winter coat.
sale.example_zh: 商店舉辦了大減價，所以我買了一件新的冬季外套。

salt.example_en: My grandmother added a little salt to the soup to make it taste better.
salt.example_zh: 我的祖母在湯裡加了一點鹽來改善味道。

same.example_en: My sister and I wear the same uniform to school every single day.
same.example_zh: 我和我的姐姐每天都穿著相同的校服上學。

sample.example_en: The baker gave me a free sample of the new chocolate cake to try.
sample.example_zh: 麵包師傅給了我一個免費的巧克力蛋糕樣品試吃。

sand.example_en: We built a castle out of sand on the beach yesterday afternoon.
sand.example_zh: 昨天下午我們在海灘上用沙堆了一座城堡。

sandwich.example_en: I packed a chicken sandwich in my lunch box for school today.
sandwich.example_zh: 我在便當盒裡放了一個雞肉三明治帶去學校。

satisfy.example_en: The delicious meal satisfied everyone at the dinner table.
satisfy.example_zh: 美味的餐點讓餐桌上的每個人都感到滿足。

saturday.example_en: My family always goes shopping on Saturday morning at the supermarket.
saturday.example_zh: 我的家人總是在星期六早上去超市購物。

sauce.example_en: Would you like some sauce on your pizza, or do you prefer it plain?
sauce.example_zh: 你要在披薩上加調味汁嗎，還是喜歡吃原味的？

save.example_en: The lifeguard saved the child who was drowning in the pool.
save.example_zh: 救生員救了那個在游泳池裡溺水的小孩。

say.example_en: My teacher always says that practice makes perfect in learning English.
say.example_zh: 我的老師總是說在學英文時，熟能生巧。

scare.definition: （使）驚恐，（使）害怕;受驚嚇，感到害怕
scare.example_en: The loud thunder scared the dog, so it hid under the bed.
scare.example_zh: 響亮的雷聲嚇到了狗，所以牠躲在床底下。

scarf.example_en: She wrapped a warm wool scarf around her neck on the cold winter day.
scarf.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬天，她在脖子上圍了一條溫暖的羊毛圍巾。

scene.example_en: The movie had an exciting action scene that made everyone in the theater jump.
scene.example_zh: 這部電影有一個令人興奮的動作場景，讓戲院裡的所有人都跳起來。

scenery.example_en: The scenery in the mountain village was so beautiful that we took many photos.
scenery.example_zh: 山村的風景非常漂亮，我們拍了很多照片。

school.example_en: I go to school by bus every day, and it takes about twenty minutes.
school.example_zh: 我每天坐公車去學校，需要花大約二十分鐘。

science.definition: 科學;自然科學;科學知識
science.example_en: My favorite subject is science because we do interesting experiments in class.
science.example_zh: 我最喜歡的科目是自然科學，因為我們在課堂上做有趣的實驗。

scientist.example_en: Marie Curie was a famous scientist who made important discoveries about radioactivity.
scientist.example_zh: 瑪麗亞·居里是一位著名的科學家，她在放射性方面做出了重要發現。

scooter.example_en: My little brother rides his scooter to his friend's house almost every day.
scooter.example_zh: 我的小弟幾乎每天都騎踏板車去朋友家。

score.example_en: Our team scored three goals in the first half of the football match.
score.example_zh: 我們隊在足球比賽的上半場進了三個球。

screen.example_en: I accidentally dropped my phone on the floor and the screen cracked badly.
screen.example_zh: 我不小心把手機掉在地上，螢幕裂得很嚴重。

sea.example_en: During summer vacation, we went to the sea and swam for hours.
sea.example_zh: 暑假期間，我們去了海邊，游了好幾個小時。

seafood.definition: 海產，海鮮（尤指魚或貝類）
seafood.example_en: My grandmother often cooks delicious seafood dishes using fish and shrimp.
seafood.example_zh: 我的奶奶經常用魚和蝦烹飪美味的海鮮菜餚。

search.example_en: The police searched the house for clues about the missing necklace.
search.example_zh: 警察搜查房子尋找遺失項鍊的線索。

season.example_en: Winter is my favorite season because I love playing in the snow.
season.example_zh: 冬天是我最喜歡的季節，因為我喜歡在雪中玩耍。

seat.example_en: There were no empty seats left on the bus, so I had to stand.
seat.example_zh: 公車上沒有空座位了，所以我必須站著。

second.example_en: Sarah finished the race first, and her twin brother came in second.
second.example_zh: 莎拉首先完成了比賽，她的雙胞胎兄弟排名第二。

secret.example_en: She promised not to tell anyone the secret about their surprise party.
secret.example_zh: 她答應不會告訴任何人關於驚喜派對的秘密。

secretary.example_en: The secretary answered the phone and scheduled appointments for the boss.
secretary.example_zh: 秘書接電話並為老闆安排會議時間。

section.example_en: Our classroom is in the south section of the school building.
section.example_zh: 我們的教室在學校建築的南側。

see.example_en: From the mountain top, we could see the entire city below us.
see.example_zh: 從山頂上，我們能看到下面的整個城市。

seed.example_en: My grandfather planted tomato seeds in his garden last spring.
seed.example_zh: 我祖父去年春天在他的花園裡種了番茄種子。

seek.definition: 尋找；尋求（尤指非物質的東西）
seek.example_en: Many students seek advice from their teachers before choosing a career.
seek.example_zh: 許多學生在選擇職業前向老師尋求建議。

seem.example_en: The math test seemed difficult, but most students still passed it.
seem.example_zh: 數學測驗看起來很難，但大多數學生還是通過了。

seesaw.example_en: The children took turns on the seesaw, laughing as they went up and down.
seesaw.example_zh: 孩子們輪流坐蹺蹺板，上下搖晃時笑個不停。

seldom.example_en: My grandfather seldom goes out now that he is very old.
seldom.example_zh: 我祖父現在年紀很大了，很少出門。

select.example_en: The teacher selected five students to represent the class at the competition.
select.example_zh: 老師選擇了五名學生代表班級參加比賽。

self.example_en: Learning to be true to yourself is more important than following others.
self.example_zh: 忠於自己比跟隨他人更重要。

selfish.example_en: Tom was selfish and refused to share his toys with his younger sister.
selfish.example_zh: 湯姆很自私，拒絕和他妹妹分享玩具。

sell.example_en: My mother sells handmade jewelry online to earn extra money.
sell.example_zh: 我媽媽在線上販售手工珠寶來賺取額外收入。

semester.definition: （尤指美國和澳大利亞大學的）學期
semester.example_en: The first semester of the school year ends right before Christmas.
semester.example_zh: 學年的第一學期在聖誕節前結束。

send.example_en: Please send me a text message when you arrive at the station.
send.example_zh: 當你到達車站時，請傳簡訊給我。

sense.definition: 官能;感覺;知覺（尤指視覺、聽覺、嗅覺、味覺和觸覺）
sense.example_en: The dog's sense of smell is much stronger than a human's.
sense.example_zh: 狗的嗅覺比人類的強得多。

sentence.example_en: I found three spelling mistakes in the last sentence of her essay.
sentence.example_zh: 我在她文章最後一句找到三個拼寫錯誤。

september.example_en: My birthday is in September, so I usually have parties with my friends.
september.example_zh: 我的生日在九月，所以我通常會和朋友辦派對。

serious.example_en: The accident was serious, so the police arrived within five minutes.
serious.example_zh: 那場事故很嚴重，所以警察在五分鐘內趕到了。

servant.example_en: In old stories, servants worked long hours cleaning large houses.
servant.example_zh: 在古老的故事中，傭人在大宅裡工作很長時間做清潔。

serve.example_en: The restaurant serves delicious pizza and fresh pasta every evening.
serve.example_zh: 這家餐廳每晚提供美味的披薩和新鮮的義大利麵。

service.definition: 公共服務系統；公共事業
service.example_en: The water service was cut off yesterday because of heavy repairs.
service.example_zh: 由於進行大規模修繕，昨天的自來水服務被中斷了。

set.definition: 放，置;使處於（指定的地方、位置）
set.example_en: He set his bag down on the floor when he arrived home.
set.example_zh: 他到家時把包放在了地上。

settle.definition: 確定;決定;解決，結束（爭端等）
settle.example_en: The two neighbors finally settled their argument by talking to each other.
settle.example_zh: 這兩個鄰居終於通過互相交談解決了他們的爭執。

seven.example_en: There are seven days in one week, from Monday to Sunday.
seven.example_zh: 一週有七天，從星期一到星期日。

seventeen.example_en: She will turn seventeen on her next birthday in March.
seventeen.example_zh: 她在三月的生日時將滿十七歲。

seventy.example_en: My grandfather is seventy years old and still enjoys playing sports.
seventy.example_zh: 我的祖父已經七十歲了，仍然喜歡運動。

several.example_en: I made several mistakes on the math test yesterday.
several.example_zh: 我昨天的數學考試中犯了幾個錯誤。

shake.example_en: The earthquake shook the building so hard that things fell off the shelves.
shake.example_zh: 地震搖晃得非常厲害，東西都從架子上掉了下來。

shall.definition: （用於在主語爲 I 或 we 時替代 will）
shall.example_en: Shall we meet at the coffee shop after school today?
shall.example_zh: 我們今天放學後在咖啡館碰面好嗎？

shape.example_en: The moon has a round shape and looks beautiful at night.
shape.example_zh: 月亮呈圓形，晚上看起來很美麗。

share.example_en: My brother and I share the same bedroom in our house.
share.example_zh: 我和哥哥在家裡共用同一間臥室。

shark.example_en: The documentary showed a shark hunting other fish in the ocean.
shark.example_zh: 這部紀錄片展示了一條鯊魚在海洋中捕獵其他魚類。

sharp.example_en: The knife has a sharp edge, so we must be careful when cooking.
sharp.example_zh: 這把刀的刀刃很鋒利，所以我們煮飯時必須小心。

sheep.example_en: The farmer has fifty sheep that eat grass in the green fields.
sheep.example_zh: 農民有五十隻羊在綠色田野裡吃草。

sheet.example_en: I washed the white sheets and dried them under the sun.
sheet.example_zh: 我洗了白色床單，並在陽光下晾乾了。

shelf.definition: （通常指固定在牆上或櫥櫃中的）架子
shelf.example_en: My sister placed her favorite books on the wooden shelf in her bedroom.
shelf.example_zh: 我姐姐把她最喜歡的書放在臥室的木製架子上。

shell.example_en: The hermit crab carried a hard shell on its back while walking.
shell.example_zh: 寄居蟹邊走邊背著堅硬的殼。

shine.example_en: The morning sun began to shine through the large classroom windows.
shine.example_zh: 早晨的陽光開始透過大教室的窗戶照射進來。

ship.example_en: The large ship sailed across the ocean toward the distant island port.
ship.example_zh: 那艘大船航行過大洋，駛向遠處的島嶼港口。

shirt.example_en: Dad wore a blue shirt to the office every weekday morning.
shirt.example_zh: 爸爸每個工作日早上都穿著藍色襯衫去辦公室。

shock.definition: 令人震驚的事件（或經歷）；驚愕，震驚
shock.example_en: The sudden news about the accident came as a terrible shock to everyone.
shock.example_zh: 突然傳來的意外消息讓所有人都感到非常震驚。

shoe.example_en: She took off her wet shoes and placed them by the door.
shoe.example_zh: 她脫掉濕漉漉的鞋子，把它們放在門邊。

shoot.definition: 開（槍），射（箭）;發射;射中，射傷，射殺
shoot.example_en: The basketball player shot the ball and it went into the hoop perfectly.
shoot.example_zh: 籃球運動員射出籃球，它完美地進入了籃框。

shop.example_en: Every Saturday morning, my mother goes to the flower shop near our home.
shop.example_zh: 每個星期六早上，我媽媽都去我們家附近的花店。

shore.example_en: We ran along the sandy shore collecting colorful shells and smooth pebbles.
shore.example_zh: 我們沿著沙灘跑動，收集五顏六色的貝殼和光滑的小石子。

short.example_en: My little brother is too short to reach the apples on the tall tree.
short.example_zh: 我弟弟太矮了，夠不到高樹上的蘋果。

shorts.definition: （常在熱天或運動時穿的）短褲
shorts.example_en: During summer sports day, all students wore comfortable shorts and sneakers.
shorts.example_zh: 在夏季運動會上，所有學生都穿著舒適的短褲和運動鞋。

should.example_en: You should study hard for the exam if you want good grades.
should.example_zh: 如果你想考好成績，你應該認真讀書。

shoulder.example_en: The heavy backpack rested on her left shoulder during the hike.
shoulder.example_zh: 沉重的背包在登山時緊緊地壓在她的左肩上。

shout.example_en: The coach shouted instructions to the soccer players during the important match.
shout.example_zh: 教練在重要比賽中對足球運動員大聲喊出指示。

show.example_en: The teacher showed the class an interesting video about ancient Egyptian pyramids.
show.example_zh: 老師給班級展示了一段關於古埃及金字塔的有趣影片。

shower.example_en: After playing basketball, he took a cold shower to cool down quickly.
shower.example_zh: 打完籃球後，他洗了一個冷水澡來快速冷卻。

shrimp.example_en: The restaurant served delicious fried shrimp with a special garlic sauce.
shrimp.example_zh: 餐廳供應美味的炒蝦，配上特製蒜汁。

shut.example_en: Before leaving home, she shut all the windows to keep the cold wind out.
shut.example_zh: 離家前，她關好所有窗戶以防止冷風吹進來。

shy.example_en: The shy student always sits quietly in the back and rarely talks to others.
shy.example_zh: 害羞的學生總是坐在後面安靜地聽課，很少和別人說話。

sick.definition: 生病的，患病的，不舒服的
sick.example_en: My brother was sick with the flu last week and stayed home from school.
sick.example_zh: 我的哥哥上週得了流感，在家裡沒去上學。

side.example_en: Please write your name on the right side of the paper.
side.example_zh: 請在紙張的右側寫下你的名字。

sidewalk.example_en: Children rode their bicycles on the sidewalk near their house.
sidewalk.example_zh: 孩子們在他們家附近的人行道上騎自行車。

sight.example_en: Grandmother wears glasses every day because her sight is not very good.
sight.example_zh: 祖母每天戴眼鏡，因為她的視力不是很好。

sign.example_en: Please sign your name at the bottom of this form.
sign.example_zh: 請在這份表格的底部簽上你的名字。

silence.example_en: The library is a place of silence where everyone reads quietly.
silence.example_zh: 圖書館是一個寧靜的地方，每個人都安靜地閱讀。

silent.example_en: The silent night was beautiful as we watched the stars above.
silent.example_zh: 我們看著星星時，寧靜的夜晚非常美麗。

silk.example_en: Her new dress was made of silk and felt very soft to touch.
silk.example_zh: 她的新洋裝是用絲綢做的，摸起來很柔軟。

silly.example_en: The silly joke made all the children laugh and giggle loudly.
silly.example_zh: 那個傻笑話讓所有孩子都大笑不止。

silver.example_en: Grandmother has a silver ring that her mother gave to her.
silver.example_zh: 祖母有一枚她母親給她的銀戒指。

similar.example_en: These two shirts are similar in color but different in size.
similar.example_zh: 這兩件襯衫顏色相似，但尺寸不同。

simple.example_en: The math problem was simple enough for the young students to solve.
simple.example_zh: 這個數學題目足夠簡單，讓年輕學生能夠解決。

simply.example_en: The movie was simply amazing and everyone loved watching it.
simply.example_zh: 那部電影簡直太棒了，每個人都喜歡看它。

since.example_en: She has lived in Taipei since she was born twenty years ago.
since.example_zh: 她從二十年前出生以來就一直住在台北。

sincere.definition: （人、感情或行爲）真誠的，誠實的
sincere.example_en: His sincere apology made me forgive him for breaking my toy.
sincere.example_zh: 他真誠的道歉讓我原諒了他打破我玩具的行為。

sing.example_en: Every morning, the birds sing beautiful songs in the garden trees.
sing.example_zh: 每天早晨，鳥兒在花園的樹上唱著美麗的歌曲。

singer.example_en: The famous singer performed at the concert last Saturday evening.
singer.example_zh: 這位著名歌手上週六晚上在音樂會上表演。

single.example_en: She ate a single apple for her snack during the school day.
single.example_zh: 她在上學期間吃了一個蘋果當零食。

sink.example_en: The heavy rock will sink to the bottom of the lake quickly.
sink.example_zh: 那塊沈重的石頭會很快沉入湖底。

sir.example_en: Sir, could you tell me where the train station is please?
sir.example_zh: 先生，請問火車站在哪裡？

sister.example_en: My sister and I share a bedroom and help each other with homework.
sister.example_zh: 我和妹妹共用一間臥室，互相幫助做功課。

sit.example_en: After the long hiking trip, everyone wanted to sit down and rest.
sit.example_zh: 經過漫長的登山旅行後，大家都想坐下來休息。

sitter.definition: 擺姿勢讓人畫像的模特兒，被畫像者
sitter.example_en: The artist spent three hours painting the sitter's portrait in detail.
sitter.example_zh: 藝術家花了三小時詳細地繪製被畫像者的肖像。

six.example_en: The dice landed on six, so I could move ahead in the board game.
six.example_zh: 骰子停在六，所以我可以在桌遊中前進。

sixteen.example_en: When she turned sixteen, her parents gave her a surprise birthday party.
sixteen.example_zh: 當她滿十六歲時，父母為她舉辦了一個驚喜派對。

sixty.example_en: My grandfather is sixty years old and still enjoys playing basketball.
sixty.example_zh: 我的祖父六十歲了，仍然喜歡打籃球。

size.example_en: These shoes are too large for my size, so I need to exchange them.
size.example_zh: 這雙鞋對我的尺寸太大了，所以我需要換一雙。

skate.example_en: Every winter, we skate on the frozen lake behind our school.
skate.example_zh: 每年冬天，我們都在學校後面的結冰湖上滑冰。

ski.example_en: Last winter vacation, my family went to the mountains to ski together.
ski.example_zh: 上個冬假，我的家人一起去山區滑雪。

skill.example_en: Learning to play the guitar requires practice and patience to build skill.
skill.example_zh: 學習彈吉他需要練習和耐心才能提高技巧。

skillful.example_en: The skillful chef prepared the meal with amazing flavors and presentation.
skillful.example_zh: 技藝高超的廚師以驚人的風味和擺盤方式準備了這餐飯。

skin.example_en: After playing in the sun all day, his skin became red and sunburned.
skin.example_zh: 在陽光下玩了一整天後，他的皮膚變紅了，曬傷了。

skinny.example_en: The skinny cat was always hungry and meowed loudly for food.
skinny.example_zh: 那隻瘦弱的貓總是很餓，大聲叫著要食物。

skirt.example_en: She wore a blue skirt to the school dance and looked very nice.
skirt.example_zh: 她穿著藍色裙子去參加學校舞會，看起來很漂亮。

sky.example_en: We lay on the grass and watched the clouds move across the clear blue sky.
sky.example_zh: 我們躺在草地上，看著雲在晴朗的藍天上飄動。

sleep.example_en: After eating too much cake, the little boy fell asleep during the movie.
sleep.example_zh: 吃了太多蛋糕後，小男孩在看電影時睡著了。

sleepy.example_en: The student felt sleepy in the classroom after staying up late studying.
sleepy.example_zh: 這個學生在教室裡感到昏昏欲睡，因為他熬夜讀書。

slender.example_en: The dancer had a slender figure and moved gracefully across the stage.
slender.example_zh: 舞者身材苗條，在舞台上優雅地舞動。

slide.example_en: The children slide down the ice on their sleds during winter afternoon.
slide.example_zh: 孩子們在冬天的下午坐著雪橇在冰上滑行。

slim.example_en: She followed a healthy diet and exercise plan to stay slim and fit.
slim.example_zh: 她按照健康的飲食和運動計劃來保持身材苗條。

slippers.example_en: I put on my slippers and walked into the kitchen to make breakfast.
slippers.example_zh: 我穿上拖鞋，走進廚房準備早餐。

slow.example_en: The internet connection in my village is very slow during peak hours.
slow.example_zh: 我村子裡的網路在尖峰時段非常慢。

small.example_en: She bought a small plant for her desk at the office.
small.example_zh: 她為辦公室的書桌買了一株小植物。

smart.example_en: He wore a smart blue suit to the business meeting yesterday.
smart.example_zh: 他昨天穿著一套時髦的藍色套裝去參加商務會議。

smell.example_en: The flowers in the garden smell really sweet and fresh.
smell.example_zh: 花園裡的花聞起來很甜美清新。

smile.example_en: When I told him the good news, he smiled with joy.
smile.example_zh: 當我告訴他好消息時，他開心地微笑了。

smoke.example_en: The smoke from the barbecue was quite thick and white.
smoke.example_zh: 烤肉的煙很濃密，呈白色。

snack.example_en: I always keep some biscuits as a snack in my school bag.
snack.example_zh: 我總是在書包裡放一些餅乾當點心。

snail.example_en: After the rain, we found a snail on the wet path.
snail.example_zh: 下雨後，我們在濕漉漉的路上發現了一隻蝸牛。

snake.example_en: The green snake moved slowly across the branch in the forest.
snake.example_zh: 綠色的蛇在森林的樹枝上緩慢地移動。

sneakers.example_en: She wore comfortable sneakers because she had to walk a lot.
sneakers.example_zh: 她穿著舒適的運動鞋，因為她要走很多路。

snow.example_en: The snow covered the entire mountain with a white blanket.
snow.example_zh: 雪用白色的被子覆蓋了整座山。

snowy.example_en: We had a snowy day last winter, and everything looked beautiful.
snowy.example_zh: 去年冬天我們經歷了一個下雪的日子，一切看起來都很美。

so.example_en: The soup was so hot that I had to wait before drinking.
so.example_zh: 湯非常燙，我得等等才能喝。

soap.example_en: She washed her hands with soap under the running water.
soap.example_zh: 她用肥皂在流動的水下洗手。

soccer.example_en: My brother plays soccer with his friends every weekend.
soccer.example_zh: 我哥哥每個週末都和朋友們踢足球。

social.example_en: Our school organized a social event for students to get together.
social.example_zh: 我們學校組織了一個社交活動，讓學生聚在一起。

society.example_en: Technology has changed the way that society works and communicates.
society.example_zh: 科技改變了社會的運作和溝通方式。

sock.example_en: I lost one sock from my favorite pair in the washing machine.
sock.example_zh: 我最喜歡的襪子有一隻在洗衣機裡遺失了。

soda.example_en: The teenagers drank cold soda while watching the film at home.
soda.example_zh: 青少年在家看電影時喝著冷的汽水。

sofa.example_en: The living room has a comfortable sofa where the family watches movies together.
sofa.example_zh: 客廳裡有一張舒適的沙發，全家人在那裡一起看電影。

soft.example_en: The baby's skin is so soft that it feels like touching a cloud.
soft.example_zh: 嬰兒的皮膚很軟，摸起來就像在摸雲一樣。

soldier.example_en: The young soldier stood guard at the entrance of the military base.
soldier.example_zh: 年輕的士兵在軍事基地的入口處站崗。

solve.example_en: The math teacher helped us solve the difficult equations step by step.
solve.example_zh: 數學老師逐步幫助我們解決這些困難的方程式。

some.example_en: We need to buy some groceries before the supermarket closes tonight.
some.example_zh: 我們需要在超市今晚關閉前購買一些雜貨。

someone.example_en: Someone left a note on my desk, but I don't know who wrote it.
someone.example_zh: 有人在我的書桌上留下了一張紙條，但我不知道誰寫的。

something.example_en: I heard something strange coming from the abandoned house last night.
something.example_zh: 我昨晚聽到來自廢棄房屋的奇怪聲音。

sometimes.example_en: Sometimes I go to the beach on weekends when the weather is nice.
sometimes.example_zh: 有時候當天氣好的時候，我會在週末去海灘。

somewhere.example_en: My keys are somewhere in this room, but I cannot find them anywhere.
somewhere.example_zh: 我的鑰匙在這個房間的某處，但我找不到它們。

son.example_en: Her son just finished his first year of middle school with excellent grades.
son.example_zh: 她的兒子剛完成了他的第一年國中課程，成績優異。

song.example_en: The children sang a beautiful song about nature during the school concert.
song.example_zh: 孩子們在學校音樂會上唱了一首關於自然的美麗歌曲。

soon.example_en: The summer holiday will come soon, and we are all excited about it.
soon.example_zh: 暑假將很快到來，我們都對此感到興奮。

sore.example_en: My throat is sore today because I caught a cold yesterday.
sore.example_zh: 我的喉嚨今天很痛，因為我昨天感冒了。

sorry.example_en: I felt sorry when my best friend had to move to another city.
sorry.example_zh: 當我最好的朋友不得不搬到另一個城市時，我感到難過。

soul.example_en: Music touches the soul and makes us feel emotions we cannot express easily.
soul.example_zh: 音樂觸及靈魂，讓我們感受到無法輕易表達的情感。

sound.example_en: A loud sound suddenly woke us up in the middle of the night.
sound.example_zh: 一個巨大的聲音在半夜突然把我們吵醒了。

soup.example_en: My grandmother makes delicious chicken soup that warms us on cold days.
soup.example_zh: 我的祖母做的雞湯很好喝，在寒冷的日子裡暖和我們。

sour.example_en: The lemon tastes too sour, so I added sugar to make it sweet.
sour.example_zh: 檸檬的味道太酸了，所以我加了糖使它變甜。

source.definition: 來源，出處;發源地;起源，根源
source.example_en: The mountain spring is the source of the clean water we use daily.
source.example_zh: 山泉是我們每天使用的乾淨水的來源。

south.example_en: The south of the island has warm beaches and tropical forests.
south.example_zh: 島嶼南部有溫暖的海灘和熱帶森林。

soy.example_en: The farmers grow soy on hundreds of acres of land every year.
soy.example_zh: 農民每年在數百英畝的土地上種植大豆。

space.example_en: There is not enough space in the cupboard for all these dishes.
space.example_zh: 碗櫃裡沒有足夠的空間放下這些盤子。

spaghetti.example_en: My little sister loves to eat spaghetti with tomato sauce on Sunday.
spaghetti.example_zh: 我妹妹喜歡在星期日吃番茄醬義大利麵。

speak.example_en: He was too nervous to speak in front of the whole class.
speak.example_zh: 他太緊張了，無法在全班面前說話。

speaker.example_en: The guest speaker shared her experience working in different countries.
speaker.example_zh: 那位客座演講者分享了她在不同國家工作的經驗。

special.definition: 特殊的，特別的；不尋常的
special.example_en: Winning the first prize in the competition was a special moment for her.
special.example_zh: 在比賽中贏得一等獎對她來說是一個特別的時刻。

speech.definition: 說話能力;說話;談話;言語
speech.example_en: The principal gave an interesting speech at the school assembly this morning.
speech.example_zh: 校長在今早的全校集會上發表了一次有趣的演講。

speed.example_en: The car was traveling at a dangerous speed on the narrow mountain road.
speed.example_zh: 汽車在狹窄的山路上以危險的速度行駛。

spell.example_en: Most students found it difficult to spell the longer English words correctly.
spell.example_zh: 大多數學生發現很難正確拼寫那些較長的英文單字。

spend.example_en: She spends most of her pocket money on books and snacks.
spend.example_zh: 她把大部分零用錢花在書籍和零食上。

spider.example_en: A large spider had built its web in the corner of the bathroom.
spider.example_zh: 一隻大蜘蛛在浴室的角落結了網。

spirit.definition: 精神；（尤指特定人群、活動、時代或地方的）主導精神
spirit.example_en: The team showed great spirit and never gave up until the very end.
spirit.example_zh: 這支隊伍表現出很強的精神，直到最後都沒有放棄。

spoon.example_en: He stirred his coffee with a silver spoon while waiting for his friend.
spoon.example_zh: 他用銀湯匙攪動咖啡，等待著他的朋友。

sport.definition: 體育運動；體育比賽；體育競技項目
sport.example_en: Basketball is the sport that most students in our school enjoy playing.
sport.example_zh: 籃球是我們學校大多數學生喜歡玩的運動。

spring.example_en: The flowers bloom beautifully in spring after the long cold winter.
spring.example_zh: 漫長的寒冬之後，花朵在春天美麗地綻放。

square.example_en: The teacher drew a blue square on the whiteboard for the geometry lesson.
square.example_zh: 老師在白板上畫了一個藍色正方形進行幾何課程。

stage.example_en: At this stage of learning, students should focus on improving their pronunciation.
stage.example_zh: 在學習的這個階段，學生應該專注於改進他們的發音。

stair.example_en: He missed a stair while going down and nearly fell to the bottom.
stair.example_zh: 他下樓時踏空了一級臺階，差點跌到底部。

stamp.example_en: Sarah collected colorful stamps from different countries in a small notebook.
stamp.example_zh: 莎拉在一個小筆記本裡收集來自不同國家的彩色郵票。

stand.definition: （使）直立；（使）站立；豎放；（尤指）站起來
stand.example_en: He stood at the back of the classroom because all the seats were taken.
stand.example_zh: 他站在教室後面，因為所有的座位都被佔了。

star.example_en: At night, you can see thousands of bright stars in the sky above.
star.example_zh: 晚上，你可以看到天空中成千上萬的閃亮星星。

start.example_en: The concert will start at eight o'clock this Friday evening.
start.example_zh: 演唱會將於這個星期五晚上八點開始。

state.example_en: After the earthquake, the city was in a terrible state.
state.example_zh: 地震後，這座城市的狀況非常糟糕。

station.example_en: My father takes the train every morning from the central station downtown.
station.example_zh: 我爸爸每天早上從市中心的火車站乘坐火車。

stationery.example_en: She bought some new pens and notebooks at the stationery shop.
stationery.example_zh: 她在文具店買了一些新鋼筆和筆記本。

stay.example_en: We are planning to stay at my grandmother's house for two weeks next month.
stay.example_zh: 我們計畫下個月在我奶奶家住兩週。

steak.definition: 肉排;肉塊;魚排;魚塊;（尤指）牛排
steak.example_en: For his birthday dinner, my father ordered a medium-rare steak and wine.
steak.example_zh: 在他的生日晚宴上，我父親點了一份半熟的牛排和葡萄酒。

steal.example_en: The thief tried to steal a diamond necklace from the jewelry store.
steal.example_zh: 小偷試圖從珠寶店偷一條鑽石項鍊。

steam.example_en: Hot steam came out of the pot when my mother opened the lid quickly.
steam.example_zh: 媽媽快速打開鍋蓋時，熱蒸汽從鍋裡冒出來。

step.example_en: Please step carefully on each stair because they are very old and slippery.
step.example_zh: 請小心地踩著每一級樓梯，因為它們很老舊而且很滑。

still.example_en: Even though it is already midnight, the children are still playing video games.
still.example_zh: 雖然已經是午夜，孩子們仍然在玩電動遊戲。

stingy.example_en: My uncle is so stingy that he never wants to spend money on anything.
stingy.example_zh: 我叔叔太小氣了，他從不願意花錢買任何東西。

stomach.example_en: After eating too much spicy food, my stomach hurt for the rest of the day.
stomach.example_zh: 吃了太多辛辣食物後，我的肚子整天都很疼。

stomachache.example_en: I had a terrible stomachache yesterday and could not go to school.
stomachache.example_zh: 我昨天肚子疼得很厲害，不能上學。

stone.example_en: The children threw stones into the river and watched them sink into the water.
stone.example_zh: 孩子們把石頭扔進河裡，看著它們沉入水中。

stop.example_en: Please stop making noise because the baby is trying to sleep right now.
stop.example_zh: 請停止製造噪音，因為寶寶現在在試著睡覺。

store.example_en: Last weekend, my friends and I went shopping at the new department store.
store.example_zh: 上週末，我和朋友們去新開的百貨商店購物。

storm.example_en: Yesterday afternoon, a terrible storm brought heavy rain and strong winds to our town.
storm.example_zh: 昨天下午，一場可怕的暴風雨給我們鎮帶來了大雨和強風。

story.definition: （真實或虛構的）故事;敘述，描述;小說
story.example_en: My grandmother likes to tell me interesting stories about her life when she was young.
story.example_zh: 我奶奶喜歡給我講她年輕時的有趣故事。

stove.example_en: During winter, my family gathers around the stove to stay warm and comfortable.
stove.example_zh: 冬天，我的家人圍坐在爐子旁保持溫暖舒適。

straight.example_en: The road goes straight through the forest without any curves.
straight.example_zh: 這條路筆直地穿過森林，沒有任何彎曲。

strange.definition: 不尋常的；奇怪的；不可思議的
strange.example_en: I heard a strange noise coming from the attic last night.
strange.example_zh: 昨晚我聽到從閣樓傳來的奇怪聲音。

stranger.example_en: My parents always warn me not to talk to strangers online.
stranger.example_zh: 我的父母總是警告我不要和陌生人在線聊天。

straw.example_en: The farmer collected straw from the field after harvest season.
straw.example_zh: 收穫季節後，農民從田裡收集稻草。

strawberry.example_en: My little sister picked fresh strawberries from the garden yesterday afternoon.
strawberry.example_zh: 昨天下午我的妹妹從花園裡摘了新鮮的草莓。

stream.example_en: Children played in the shallow stream near our village during summer.
stream.example_zh: 夏天時，孩子們在村子附近的淺溪裡玩耍。

street.example_en: The main street in town is always crowded with shops and restaurants.
street.example_zh: 鎮上的主要街道總是擠滿了商店和餐廳。

strike.example_en: The workers announced a strike to demand better working conditions.
strike.example_zh: 工人們宣布罷工以要求更好的工作條件。

strong.definition: 強有力的，強勁的；強壯的；強烈的
strong.example_en: The strong wind knocked down several trees during the typhoon.
strong.example_zh: 強烈的風在颱風期間吹倒了幾棵樹。

student.example_en: Every student must complete their homework before the next class.
student.example_zh: 每個學生必須在下堂課之前完成作業。

study.example_en: I need to study hard for the math exam next week.
study.example_zh: 我需要為下週的數學考試努力讀書。

stupid.definition: 愚蠢的;糊塗的;欠考慮的
stupid.example_en: It was stupid of me to forget my umbrella on such a rainy day.
stupid.example_zh: 我在這麼下雨的日子裡忘記帶傘真是很愚蠢。

style.definition: 做事方式；（尤指）風格，作風
style.example_en: Each artist has their own unique style of painting and expression.
style.example_zh: 每個藝術家都有自己獨特的繪畫和表達風格。

subject.definition: （討論、考慮或研究的）主題，話題;問題;題目
subject.example_en: The history subject covers many important events from different countries.
subject.example_zh: 歷史科目涵蓋了來自不同國家的許多重要事件。

subway.example_en: Taking the subway is faster than driving through heavy traffic.
subway.example_zh: 搭乘地鐵比在繁忙的交通中駕駛更快。

succeed.definition: 成功；實現目標；達到目的
succeed.example_en: With practice and determination, you can succeed in learning any skill.
succeed.example_zh: 通過練習和決心，你可以成功學會任何技能。

success.example_en: Her hard work and dedication led to great success in her business.
success.example_zh: 她的努力和奉獻導致了她事業的巨大成功。

successful.example_en: The successful project was completed on time and within budget.
successful.example_zh: 這個成功的專案按時且在預算內完成。

sudden.example_en: There was a sudden power outage that left the entire block dark.
sudden.example_zh: 突然停電導致整個街區陷入黑暗。

sugar.example_en: My grandmother uses less sugar when baking cakes for better health.
sugar.example_zh: 我的祖母烤蛋糕時用更少的糖以保持健康。

suggest.example_en: I suggest we go to the beach this weekend instead of staying home.
suggest.example_zh: 我建議我們這個週末去海邊，而不是待在家裡。

suit.example_en: This blue shirt really suits your eyes and makes you look great.
suit.example_zh: 這件藍色襯衫很襯你的眼睛，讓你看起來很棒。

summer.example_en: Many students travel during summer vacation and visit different parts of Taiwan.
summer.example_zh: 許多學生在暑假期間旅遊，遊遍台灣的各個地方。

sun.example_en: The sun rises in the east and sets in the west every single day.
sun.example_zh: 太陽每天從東邊升起，在西邊落下。

sunday.example_en: On Sunday morning, my family usually enjoys breakfast together before church.
sunday.example_zh: 星期日早上，我的家人通常一起吃早餐，然後去教堂。

sunny.definition: 陽光明媚的，陽光普照的
sunny.example_en: Yesterday was a sunny day, so we played basketball outside the school.
sunny.example_zh: 昨天是個陽光明媚的日子，所以我們在學校外面打籃球。

super.example_en: The new video game is super fun and challenging for all ages.
super.example_zh: 這個新電玩遊戲非常有趣，對各個年齡層都很有挑戰性。

supermarket.example_en: My mother shops at the supermarket every Saturday to buy food for the week.
supermarket.example_zh: 我媽媽每個星期六都在超市購物，買一週的食物。

supper.example_en: We usually eat supper at six o'clock and talk about our school day.
supper.example_zh: 我們通常在六點吃晚餐，談論今天在學校發生的事。

supply.example_en: The school supplies each student with free textbooks and writing materials every year.
supply.example_zh: 學校每年免費提供給每位學生課本和文具。

support.example_en: My parents always support my dreams and encourage me to work harder.
support.example_zh: 我的父母總是支持我的夢想，鼓勵我更加努力。

sure.definition: 確定的，肯定的，毫無疑問的
sure.example_en: I am sure that she will pass the English test because she studies hard.
sure.example_zh: 我確信她會通過英文考試，因為她學習很努力。

surf.example_en: My brother loves to surf the internet for information about his favorite bands.
surf.example_zh: 我哥哥喜歡上網查找關於他最喜歡的樂隊的信息。

surface.example_en: The surface of the table was so smooth and shiny after my sister cleaned it.
surface.example_zh: 我姐姐清潔後，桌面變得光滑閃亮。

surprise.example_en: The birthday party will definitely surprise my best friend when she arrives tonight.
surprise.example_zh: 當我最好的朋友今晚到達時，這個生日派對一定會讓她驚喜。

surprised.example_en: She was surprised to find a puppy waiting for her at home after school.
surprised.example_zh: 她驚訝地發現放學後家裡有一隻小狗在等她。

survive.definition: 繼續生存，存活;（尤指）倖存
survive.example_en: The explorers had to survive in the desert for three weeks without much water.
survive.example_zh: 探險家不得不在沙漠裡存活三週，沒有足夠的水。

swallow.example_en: The baby bird swallows insects that its mother brings from the garden.
swallow.example_zh: 小鳥吞嚥媽媽從花園帶回來的昆蟲。

swan.example_en: We saw a beautiful white swan swimming gracefully across the lake yesterday.
swan.example_zh: 昨天我們看到一隻美麗的白天鵝優雅地在湖面上游泳。

sweater.example_en: In winter, I always wear a warm sweater over my school uniform.
sweater.example_zh: 冬天時，我總是在校服外面穿一件溫暖的毛線衫。

sweep.example_en: Every morning, my mother sweeps the living room floor very carefully.
sweep.example_zh: 每天早上，我媽媽都很仔細地掃客廳的地板。

sweet.example_en: This chocolate cake is too sweet for my younger brother's taste.
sweet.example_zh: 這個巧克力蛋糕對我弟弟的口味來說太甜了。

swim.example_en: During summer vacation, we like to swim in the public pool.
swim.example_zh: 暑假期間，我們喜歡在公共游泳池游泳。

swing.example_en: The children swing happily on the playground equipment after school.
swing.example_zh: 放學後，孩子們在遊樂設施上開心地搖擺。

symbol.example_en: The white dove is a symbol of peace and hope.
symbol.example_zh: 白鴿是和平與希望的象徵。

system.example_en: Our school's new grading system helps teachers track student progress.
system.example_zh: 我們學校新的評分系統幫助老師追蹤學生的進度。

table.example_en: Can you set the table with plates and cups for dinner?

tail.example_en: The dog's tail wags happily whenever its owner comes home from work.
tail.example_zh: 每當狗的主人下班回家時，狗的尾巴就會高興地搖擺。

take.example_en: Remember to take your umbrella if you go out in the rain.
take.example_zh: 如果你要在下雨時出門，記得帶傘。

tale.definition: （尤指包含離奇內容的）故事，不實之詞
tale.example_en: My grandfather often tells us fascinating tales about his childhood adventures.
tale.example_zh: 我祖父經常給我們講他童年冒險的精彩故事。

talent.definition: 天分，天賦;天才，有天分者
talent.example_en: She discovered her musical talent after taking piano lessons for six months.
talent.example_zh: 上了六個月的鋼琴課後，她發現了自己的音樂天賦。

talk.example_en: We sat in the café and talked about our plans for summer.
talk.example_zh: 我們坐在咖啡館裡，談我們暑假的計畫。

talkative.definition: 愛說話的，健談的;多嘴的
talkative.example_en: She is very talkative in class and always has something interesting to share.
talkative.example_zh: 她在課堂上很愛說話，總是有有趣的東西分享。

tall.example_en: The basketball player is so tall that he can easily reach the hoop.
tall.example_zh: 籃球運動員個子很高，籃筐對他來說很容易夠到。

tangerine.example_en: In winter, tangerines are cheap and fresh at the local market.
tangerine.example_zh: 冬天時，當地市場的柑橘便宜又新鮮。

tank.example_en: The fish tank in our classroom needs to be cleaned every week.
tank.example_zh: 我們教室裡的魚缸每週都需要清潔。

tape.example_en: My parents still have old cassette tapes from when they were young.
tape.example_zh: 我父母還有他們年輕時的舊錄音帶。

task.definition: 任務;（尤指經常、不情願或很難做的）工作;（苦）差事
task.example_en: The main task for today's group project is to research and gather information.
task.example_zh: 今天小組項目的主要任務是研究和收集資料。

taste.example_en: The spicy taste of the chili made my mouth burn for minutes.
taste.example_zh: 辣椒的辛辣味道讓我的嘴燒了好幾分鐘。

taxi.example_en: When we missed the bus, we took a taxi to reach the airport.
taxi.example_zh: 我們錯過了公車，所以坐計程車去機場。

tea.example_en: My grandmother drinks hot tea every morning with her breakfast.
tea.example_zh: 我奶奶每天早上都喝熱茶配早餐。

teach.example_en: Mr. Chen teaches mathematics to all the ninth grade students here.
teach.example_zh: 陳老師教所有九年級學生數學。

teacher.example_en: Our English teacher assigns lots of homework every single week.
teacher.example_zh: 我們的英文老師每週指派很多功課。

team.example_en: The basketball team practiced hard and won the regional championship.
team.example_zh: 籃球隊努力練習，贏得了地區冠軍。

teapot.example_en: My mother pours hot water into the teapot before adding tea leaves.
teapot.example_zh: 我媽媽在茶壺裡加入茶葉之前先倒熱水。

tear.example_en: Be careful not to tear that paper when you open the envelope.
tear.example_zh: 打開信封時要小心別把紙撕破了。

teenager.example_en: Most teenagers in Taiwan spend hours studying for their important exams.
teenager.example_zh: 大多數台灣青少年花很多時間準備重要考試。

telephone.example_en: She called her mother on the telephone to ask about dinner plans.
telephone.example_zh: 她用電話打給媽媽問晚餐計劃。

television.definition: 電視機;電視;電視廣播業
television.example_en: My family watches television together after we finish eating dinner.
television.example_zh: 我們家人吃完晚餐後一起看電視。

tell.example_en: Please tell your sister that dinner is ready on the table now.
tell.example_zh: 請告訴你妹妹晚餐已經準備好了。

temperature.example_en: The teacher checked each student's temperature before they entered class.
temperature.example_zh: 老師在學生進教室前檢查了他們的體溫。

temple.example_en: We visited a famous temple during our family trip to the mountains.
temple.example_zh: 我們在家庭郊遊時參觀了一個著名的寺廟。

ten.example_en: There are ten people in our class study group for the exam.
ten.example_zh: 我們班級考試讀書小組裡有十個人。

tennis.example_en: My brother plays tennis after school three times every single week.
tennis.example_zh: 我哥哥每週放學後打三次網球。

tent.example_en: We set up our tent near the river during the camping trip.
tent.example_zh: 露營時我們在河邊搭起帳篷。

term.example_en: The first term of school ends in January at our middle school.
term.example_zh: 我們學校的第一學期在一月結束。

terrible.definition: 糟糕的;可怕的;嚴重的;低劣的
terrible.example_en: The weather was terrible during the outdoor sports day yesterday.
terrible.example_zh: 昨天運動會的天氣非常糟糕。

terrific.example_en: You did a terrific job on your presentation in front of the class.
terrific.example_zh: 你在課堂上的報告表現得非常出色。

test.example_en: The chemistry test was harder than everyone expected last week.
test.example_zh: 上週的化學測驗比大家預期的還要難。

textbook.example_en: We need to bring our English textbook to class every single day.
textbook.example_zh: 我們每天都需要帶英文課本來上課。

than.definition: （與 more 或 less 連用，比較數量）
than.example_en: I have more books than my sister does.

thank.example_en: She thanked her teacher for helping her understand the difficult lesson.
thank.example_zh: 她感謝老師幫助她理解這堂困難的課程。

thanksgiving.definition: 感謝，道謝;（尤指）感恩於上帝
thanksgiving.example_en: The family gathered at the table and said thanksgiving before eating dinner.
thanksgiving.example_zh: 一家人聚在飯桌前，在吃飯前表達感謝。

that.example_en: That movie you recommended was really interesting and exciting to watch.
that.example_zh: 你推薦的那部電影真的很有趣，很令人興奮。

theater.example_en: We bought tickets to see a play at the downtown theater next weekend.
theater.example_zh: 我們買票去下周末市中心劇院看一齣戲劇。

then.definition: 在當時（過去或未來）（的）;在那時（的）
then.example_en: First she studied, and then she took a break to drink some water.
then.example_zh: 她先讀書，然後休息喝水。

there.example_en: The bookstore is down the street; you can find it over there easily.
there.example_zh: 書店就在街道那邊；你很容易就能找到。

therefore.example_en: It rained all night, and therefore the soccer game was postponed until tomorrow.
therefore.example_zh: 整晚都在下雨，因此足球比賽被延期到明天。

these.example_en: These cookies my mom made taste much better than the ones from the bakery.
these.example_zh: 我媽媽做的這些餅乾比烤麵包店的好吃得多。

thick.example_en: The book had such a thick cover that it felt heavy to carry around.
thick.example_zh: 這本書的書皮這麼厚，拿起來很沉。

thief.example_en: The police caught a thief who had been stealing from neighborhood houses for months.
thief.example_zh: 警察逮捕了一個在附近偷竊好幾個月的小偷。

thin.example_en: She wore a thin sweater because the weather was warm enough that day.
thin.example_zh: 因為那天天氣很暖和，她穿了一件薄毛衣。

thing.example_en: I bought several things at the store, including milk, bread, and fresh vegetables.
thing.example_zh: 我在商店買了幾樣東西，包括牛奶、麵包和新鮮蔬菜。

think.example_en: After the test, I think I did well on most of the difficult questions.
think.example_zh: 考試之後，我覺得我答對了大部分困難的題目。

third.example_en: My younger brother is in the third grade at elementary school this year.
third.example_zh: 我弟弟今年在小學三年級。

thirsty.example_en: After running in the heat for an hour, the athletes were very thirsty.
thirsty.example_zh: 在炎熱中跑步一小時後，運動員們都非常口渴。

thirteen.example_en: My cousin turned thirteen years old and had a birthday party last month.
thirteen.example_zh: 我表弟上個月滿十三歲，舉辦了一場生日派對。

thirty.example_en: My father will buy the new phone when he turns thirty next year.
thirty.example_zh: 我爸爸說他三十歲時會買這支新手機。

this.example_en: This assignment is harder than the one we did last week, don't you agree?
this.example_zh: 這份作業比我們上週做的難，你不覺得嗎？

those.example_en: Those students over there are from the class next to ours in school.
those.example_zh: 那邊的那些學生是來自我們隔壁班的。

though.example_en: Though it was raining hard, we decided to go hiking anyway.
though.example_zh: 雖然下著大雨，我們還是決定去登山。

thought.example_en: A sudden thought crossed her mind as she walked home.
thought.example_zh: 當她走回家時，一個突然的想法掠過她的心頭。

thousand.example_en: The city welcomed a thousand visitors during the festival last month.
thousand.example_zh: 上個月這座城市在節慶期間迎接了一千位遊客。

three.example_en: My family consists of my parents and three younger brothers.
three.example_zh: 我的家庭由父母和三個弟弟組成。

throat.example_en: She felt a scratchy throat after singing for two hours.
throat.example_zh: 唱歌兩小時後，她感覺喉嚨發癢。

through.example_en: We walked through the forest and saw many beautiful birds.
through.example_zh: 我們穿過森林，看到了許多漂亮的鳥。

throw.example_en: The baseball player threw the ball with great speed and accuracy.
throw.example_zh: 那位棒球選手用很快的速度和準度投出球。

thumb.example_en: He gave a thumbs up sign to show his approval.
thumb.example_zh: 他豎起大拇指表示贊同。

thunder.example_en: The loud thunder frightened the children during the terrible storm.
thunder.example_zh: 那場可怕的暴風雨中，巨大的雷聲嚇到了孩子們。

thursday.example_en: We have English class on Thursday afternoon at half past two.
thursday.example_zh: 我們在星期四下午兩點半有英文課。

ticket.example_en: She bought a train ticket to visit her grandmother next week.
ticket.example_zh: 她買了火車票，打算下週去看望她的祖母。

tidy.definition: 整齊的;整潔的，有條理的
tidy.example_en: My sister keeps her desk very tidy with everything in place.
tidy.example_zh: 我姐姐把她的桌子收拾得很整齊，東西都放得好好的。

tie.example_en: He carefully tied his shoelaces before going out to play.
tie.example_zh: 他小心地綁好鞋帶後才出去玩。

tiger.example_en: The tiger is one of the biggest and most dangerous animals in Asia.
tiger.example_zh: 老虎是亞洲最大和最危險的動物之一。

till.example_en: I will wait for you here till you finish your work.
till.example_zh: 我會在這裡等你，直到你完成你的工作。

time.example_en: She spent most of her time studying for the important exam.
time.example_zh: 她花了大部分時間為重要的考試做準備。

tiny.example_en: The baby bird was so tiny that it fit in my hand.
tiny.example_zh: 小鳥雛那麼微小，它可以放在我的手掌裡。

tip.example_en: If you tip the chair back too far, you might fall.
tip.example_zh: 如果你把椅子往後傾太多，你可能會摔下來。

tired.example_en: After running for an hour, he was tired but very happy.
tired.example_zh: 跑了一小時後，他感到疲倦但非常高興。

title.example_en: The title of the book is interesting and made me want to read it.
title.example_zh: 這本書的書名很有趣，讓我想要讀它。

to.example_en: I want to learn how to cook delicious meals at home.
to.example_zh: 我想學會如何在家裡做美味的飯菜。

toast.example_en: My brother likes to eat toast with jam for breakfast every morning.
toast.example_zh: 我哥哥喜歡每個早晨吃塗果醬的吐司當早餐。

today.example_en: Today is Sunday, so I can sleep a little longer than usual.
today.example_zh: 今天是星期日，所以我可以比平時多睡一點。

toe.example_en: I stubbed my toe on the table leg and it hurt for hours.
toe.example_zh: 我的腳趾撞到桌腿，疼了好幾個小時。

tofu.example_en: The restaurant serves a delicious tofu dish with vegetables and sauce.
tofu.example_zh: 這家餐廳有一道美味的豆腐菜，裡面有蔬菜和醬料。

together.example_en: The class worked together to decorate the classroom for the school festival.
together.example_zh: 班級一起合作為學校慶典裝飾教室。

toilet.example_en: The bathroom toilet was broken, so we had to call a plumber.
toilet.example_zh: 浴室的馬桶壞了，所以我們不得不叫水管工。

tomato.example_en: My mother grows fresh tomatoes in the garden during summer.
tomato.example_zh: 我媽媽在夏天於菜園裡種植新鮮番茄。

tomorrow.example_en: Tomorrow is the big math test, so I need to study hard tonight.
tomorrow.example_zh: 明天是大型數學考試，所以我今晚得認真唸書。

tongue.example_en: When I ate the hot soup, I accidentally burned my tongue.
tongue.example_zh: 當我喝熱湯時，我不小心燙傷了舌頭。

tonight.example_en: Tonight we will watch a movie together after finishing our homework.
tonight.example_zh: 今晚我們做完功課後會一起看電影。

too.example_en: This coffee is too hot to drink right now, so let it cool down.
too.example_zh: 這咖啡太熱了，現在喝不了，所以讓它冷一下。

tool.definition: （用於生產或維修的）工具，器具
tool.example_en: My father used a hammer, a tool for driving nails into wood.
tool.example_zh: 我父親用錘子這個工具把釘子敲進木頭裡。

tooth.example_en: I went to the dentist because one of my teeth was causing pain.
tooth.example_zh: 我去看牙醫因為我有一顆牙齒在痛。

toothache.example_en: The toothache was so bad that I could not eat solid food.
toothache.example_zh: 牙痛得很厲害，我沒辦法吃固體食物。

toothbrush.example_en: I need to replace my old toothbrush with a new one soon.
toothbrush.example_zh: 我需要很快把舊牙刷換成新的。

top.example_en: The climbers finally reached the top of the mountain after many hours.
top.example_zh: 登山者經過許多小時後終於到達山頂。

topic.example_en: Our teacher chose the topic of climate change for the class discussion.
topic.example_zh: 我們老師選擇氣候變遷作為班級討論的主題。

total.example_en: The total cost of the trip was higher than we expected.
total.example_zh: 這次旅行的總費用比我們預期的還要高。

touch.example_en: Please do not touch the artwork on display in the museum.
touch.example_zh: 請不要觸摸博物館展示的藝術作品。

toward.example_en: She walked slowly toward the train station to catch her evening train.
toward.example_zh: 她慢慢走向火車站，趕上她傍晚的火車。

towel.example_en: After swimming, I dried my wet hair with a soft clean towel.
towel.example_zh: 游泳後，我用軟的乾毛巾擦乾我濕淋淋的頭髮。

tower.definition: 塔;建築物的塔形部分;塔樓，高樓
tower.example_en: The old tower in the middle of the city offers amazing views.
tower.example_zh: 城市中心的古老塔樓提供了驚人的景色。

town.example_en: Many people left the small town to find work in the big city.
town.example_zh: 許多人離開小城鎮到大城市找工作。

toy.example_en: The little boy played with his favorite toy car all morning long.
toy.example_zh: 小男孩整個上午都在玩他最喜歡的玩具車。

trace.example_en: Scientists traced the disease back to contaminated water in the village.
trace.example_zh: 科學家們將疾病源頭追蹤到村裡的受污染水源。

track.example_en: The old train track runs through the beautiful countryside near my town.
track.example_zh: 舊火車軌道穿過我城鎮附近美麗的鄉村。

trade.example_en: Japan's trade with other countries helps its economy grow every year.
trade.example_zh: 日本與其他國家的貿易幫助其經濟每年增長。

tradition.example_en: Our family has a tradition of eating together every Sunday dinner.
tradition.example_zh: 我們家有每個星期天一起吃晚餐的傳統。

traditional.example_en: My grandmother loves wearing traditional clothes during important Chinese holidays.
traditional.example_zh: 我的祖母喜歡在重要的中國假日穿著傳統服裝。

traffic.example_en: Heavy traffic made her arrival at the airport almost one hour late.
traffic.example_zh: 交通擁堵使她到達機場幾乎遲到了一個小時。

train.example_en: The express train to Taipei left the station exactly at seven o'clock.
train.example_zh: 往台北的快速火車在七點整離開了火車站。

trap.example_en: The hunter set a trap in the forest to catch wild rabbits.
trap.example_zh: 獵人在森林裡設了一個陷阱來捕捉野兔。

trash.example_en: Please put your empty bottles and trash in the bin outside the door.
trash.example_zh: 請把你的空瓶子和垃圾放進門外的垃圾桶。

travel.example_en: Next summer, my family wants to travel across Europe for three weeks.
travel.example_zh: 明年夏天，我的家人想要在歐洲旅行三個星期。

treasure.example_en: The pirates buried their treasure on a small island near the ocean.
treasure.example_zh: 海盜在大洋附近的一個小島上埋藏了他們的財寶。

treat.example_en: Teachers should treat all students with respect and fairness in the classroom.
treat.example_zh: 老師應該在教室裡尊重和公平對待所有學生。

tree.example_en: The big tree in front of our school provides cool shade in summer.
tree.example_zh: 我們學校前面的大樹在夏天提供了涼爽的蔭影。

triangle.example_en: The pizza slice was shaped like a triangle with three equal sides.
triangle.example_zh: 披薩切片的形狀像一個有三條相等邊的三角形。

trick.example_en: His magic trick fooled everyone at the birthday party last weekend.
trick.example_zh: 他的魔術技巧在上週末的生日派對上愚弄了每個人。

trip.example_en: We booked a weekend trip to the beach for our family vacation.
trip.example_zh: 我們預訂了一個週末去海邊的家庭旅行。

trouble.example_en: The car had some trouble starting on the cold winter morning.
trouble.example_zh: 那輛車在寒冷的冬天早晨啟動時出現了一些問題。

trousers.example_en: He wore new blue trousers to the school meeting yesterday.
trousers.example_zh: 他昨天穿著新的藍色褲子去學校開會。

truck.example_en: The delivery truck arrived early this morning with our new furniture.
truck.example_zh: 送貨卡車今天早上很早就送來了我們的新家具。

true.definition: （尤指事實或陳述）正確的，真實的，確實的；如實的
true.example_en: The story she told about her travels was completely true.
true.example_zh: 她講述的關於她旅行的故事完全是真實的。

trumpet.example_en: Jack plays the trumpet in the school marching band every week.
trumpet.example_zh: 傑克每週在學校鼓號隊裡吹小號。

trust.example_en: She trusts her best friend with all of her personal secrets.
trust.example_zh: 她信任她最好的朋友，把所有私人祕密都告訴她。

truth.example_en: The truth about what happened came out after several weeks.
truth.example_zh: 發生了什麼事的真相在幾週後才被揭露。

try.example_en: She tried her best to finish the difficult math homework on time.
try.example_zh: 她盡力按時完成了困難的數學作業。

tube.definition: （塑膠、金屬、橡膠或玻璃製成的）管，管子
tube.example_en: The toothpaste came in a small blue tube from the drugstore.
tube.example_zh: 牙膏來自藥店的一個小藍色管子。

tuesday.example_en: Every Tuesday afternoon, we have volleyball practice at the gym.
tuesday.example_zh: 每個星期二下午，我們都在體育館進行排球練習。

tunnel.example_en: The train passed through a long dark tunnel under the mountain.
tunnel.example_zh: 火車通過了山下的一條又長又黑的隧道。

turkey.example_en: My family roasted a delicious turkey for our Thanksgiving dinner.
turkey.example_zh: 我的家人為感恩節晚餐烤了一隻美味的火雞。

turn.example_en: She turned the key in the lock and opened the heavy door.
turn.example_zh: 她轉動鑰匙打開了那扇厚重的門。

turtle.example_en: We found a tiny turtle hiding under the rocks at the pond.
turtle.example_zh: 我們在池塘的石頭下發現了一隻小烏龜。

twelve.example_en: The class has exactly twelve students from our neighborhood.
twelve.example_zh: 這個班級裡恰好有十二名來自我們街區的學生。

twenty.example_en: There are twenty students in my English class this semester.
twenty.example_zh: 這個學期我的英文班裡有二十個學生。

twice.example_en: She called her mother twice this week to check on her health.
twice.example_zh: 她這週給媽媽打了兩次電話去問候她的健康情況。

two.example_en: I bought two books at the library last weekend.
two.example_zh: 我上週末在圖書館買了兩本書。

type.example_en: She types her homework on her laptop every evening.
type.example_zh: 她每晚都在筆記本電腦上打字完成作業。

typhoon.example_en: We stayed home during the typhoon because the wind was very strong.
typhoon.example_zh: 颱風來時風很大，所以我們待在家裡。

ugly.example_en: He thought the old chair was ugly, so he painted it bright blue.
ugly.example_zh: 他認為那張舊椅子很醜，所以把它漆成亮藍色。

umbrella.example_en: Remember to bring an umbrella because the weather forecast says it will rain.
umbrella.example_zh: 記得帶傘，因為天氣預報說會下雨。

uncle.definition: 舅父;伯父;叔父;姨父;姑父
uncle.example_en: My uncle took me to the baseball game last Saturday afternoon.
uncle.example_zh: 我的叔叔上週六下午帶我去看棒球比賽。

under.definition: 在（或到）下面；在（或到）下方
under.example_en: The cat was sleeping under the table when the doorbell rang.
under.example_zh: 門鈴響時，貓正在桌子下面睡覺。

underline.definition: （尤指爲了強調）在（詞語）下面畫線
underline.example_en: Please underline the important words in your notebook during the lesson.
underline.example_zh: 上課時請在筆記本中重要的詞語下面畫線。

understand.example_en: The teacher explained it again so we could all understand the difficult problem.
understand.example_zh: 老師再解釋一次，這樣我們都能理解這道難題。

underwear.example_en: She packed extra underwear and socks in her backpack for the trip.
underwear.example_zh: 她在背包裡放了額外的內衣和襪子去旅行。

unhappy.definition: 哀傷的，不高興的;不滿意的
unhappy.example_en: She felt unhappy because her best friend moved to another city.
unhappy.example_zh: 她因為最好的朋友搬到另一個城市而感到不開心。

uniform.example_en: All students must wear their school uniform every day except Wednesday.
uniform.example_zh: 除了星期三外，所有學生每天都必須穿校服。

unique.definition: 獨一無二的；與眾不同的；唯一的；獨特的；罕見的
unique.example_en: Each snowflake has its own unique pattern that nobody else can find.
unique.example_zh: 每片雪花都有它獨特的圖案，找不到兩片完全一樣。

universe.example_en: Scientists are still trying to understand many mysteries about the universe.
universe.example_zh: 科學家仍在努力了解宇宙的許多謎團。

university.example_en: My older sister got accepted to a famous university in Taiwan.
university.example_zh: 我的姐姐被台灣一所著名的大學錄取了。

until.example_en: The library is open until six o'clock, so we still have time.
until.example_zh: 圖書館開到六點，所以我們還有時間。

up.definition: 向較高處；向上；（價值、數位或水準）加大地；增高地
up.example_en: The balloon floated up and up until it disappeared in the clouds.
up.example_zh: 氣球一直向上飄，最後消失在雲裡。

upper.definition: （位置或水準）較高的，較上的；上層的
upper.example_en: The upper level of the mall has a movie theater and a restaurant.
upper.example_zh: 商場的上層有電影院和一家餐廳。

upstairs.example_en: My brother is upstairs in his room doing his homework right now.
upstairs.example_zh: 我哥哥現在在樓上的房間做功課。

use.example_en: You can use this pencil if you forgot to bring your own.
use.example_zh: 如果你忘記帶鉛筆，可以用這支。

useful.definition: 有用的，有效的；有助益的
useful.example_en: This dictionary is very useful when we need to look up words.
useful.example_zh: 當我們需要查單字時，這本字典非常有用。

user.example_en: Every user must create a password to protect their personal information.
user.example_zh: 每個使用者必須設定密碼來保護個人資訊。

usual.example_en: My usual breakfast is toast with eggs and milk.
usual.example_zh: 我通常的早餐是塗奶油的吐司和蛋及牛奶。

usually.example_en: I usually go to the library on Saturday afternoons.
usually.example_zh: 我通常在星期六下午去圖書館。

vacation.example_en: During summer vacation, many students travel with their families.
vacation.example_zh: 在暑假期間，許多學生和家人一起旅遊。

valley.example_en: The village nestled in a beautiful valley between two mountains.
valley.example_zh: 這個村莊坐落在兩座山之間美麗的山谷裡。

valuable.example_en: She keeps her grandmother's ring in a safe place because it is very valuable.
valuable.example_zh: 她把奶奶的戒指放在安全的地方，因為它非常貴重。

value.example_en: The antique watch has great value because it belonged to his grandfather.
value.example_zh: 這只古董手錶很有價值，因為它曾經屬於他的祖父。

vegetable.example_en: Carrots and broccoli are vegetables that are good for your health.
vegetable.example_zh: 胡蘿蔔和西蘭花是對你的健康有益的蔬菜。

vendor.example_en: The street vendor sells fresh fruit from his small cart every morning.
vendor.example_zh: 街邊小販每天早上都從他的小推車裡賣新鮮水果。

very.definition: （用於強調形容詞或副詞）很，非常
very.example_en: The test was very difficult and most students did not pass it.
very.example_zh: 這次考試非常困難，大多數學生沒有通過。

vest.definition: （無袖保暖）內衣;（貼身穿的）背心
vest.example_en: On cold mornings, he wears a wool vest under his shirt to stay warm.
vest.example_zh: 在寒冷的早晨，他在襯衫下穿著羊毛背心來保暖。

victory.example_en: The soccer team celebrated their victory after winning the championship game.
victory.example_zh: 足球隊在贏得冠軍賽後慶祝他們的勝利。

video.example_en: She watched a video on how to make cookies before baking them at home.
video.example_zh: 她在家烘焙前看了一段關於如何製作餅乾的影片。

village.example_en: In the small mountain village, everyone knew each other and helped their neighbors.
village.example_zh: 在這個小山村裡，每個人都認識彼此，並幫助鄰居。

vinegar.example_en: Add vinegar and oil to make a simple salad dressing.
vinegar.example_zh: 加入醋和油製作簡單的沙拉醬料。

violin.example_en: She plays the violin beautifully and hopes to become a professional musician.
violin.example_zh: 她拉小提琴拉得很美，希望成為專業音樂家。

visit.example_en: Every summer, we visit our cousins who live in the countryside.
visit.example_zh: 每年夏天，我們都去拜訪住在鄉下的堂兄妹。

visitor.example_en: The museum was crowded with visitors from different countries on the weekend.
visitor.example_zh: 週末時，這間博物館擠滿了來自不同國家的遊客。

vocabulary.definition: 詞彙量;（某人掌握的）全部詞彙
vocabulary.example_en: Reading books is a great way to improve your English vocabulary naturally.
vocabulary.example_zh: 閱讀書籍是自然改善英文詞彙的好方法。

voice.example_en: His voice was so soft and gentle that everyone had to listen carefully.
voice.example_zh: 他的嗓音很柔和，每個人都要仔細聽才能聽到。

volleyball.example_en: She joined the volleyball team and quickly became one of their best players.
volleyball.example_zh: 她加入排球隊，很快就成為他們最好的球員之一。

vote.example_en: All citizens voted for their favorite candidate in the election last week.
